programme.desc: Doug and Carrie fail to make a good impression on a professional couple who move in next door, while Arthur takes advantage of Spencers job. With Leah Remini and Kevin James

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie is stunned when God seemingly grants her prayers for a pay rise - so starts putting in more, far-from-spiritual requests with the Almighty. Doug tries to talk her out of it but, with an important football game on the horizon, he decides he could do with a bit of divine intervention himself

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray grows tired of Debras cooking and asks Marie to teach her how to make his favourite dish - spaghetti and meatballs - leading to chaos in the kitchen. Starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Doris Roberts

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray runs into trouble while trying to show Debra he can take over the running of the family finances, and resorts to a series of elaborate lies to get himself out of the mess he has created. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray goes on patrol with his policeman brother Robert and ends up foiling a robbery at a local restaurant by pelting the would-be thief with pizza. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A workmate agrees to teach Frasier enough Hebrew to deliver the speech at his son Fredericks bar mitzvah, but the arrangement ends in double-dealing and mutual recrimination. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: In the first of a three-part story, Frasier struggles to replace Daphne and ends up hiring a woman who proves to be completely unsuitable. Meanwhile, Niles experiences an amazing chain of events, including winning the same competition twice and having his car struck by lightning

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part two of three. While Niles waits to undergo his heart bypass operation, Frasier tries to keep everyones spirits up by describing the procedure in detail - a brainwave that leaves Daphne more depressed than ever. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Substitute teacher Mrs Cantwell (Tina Fey) takes an instant dislike to Lisa, and vows to give the youngster extra credit if she can figure out why. Meanwhile, Flanders is plagued with guilt after punching Homer. Featuring the guest voice of author Richard Dawkins

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns attempts to fulfil his lifelong ambition of becoming a superhero and take down a rogues gallery of familiar faces, but devoted sidekick Smithers secretly intervenes after noticing his boss isnt quite up to the challenge. Lisa steps in as Barts attorney when he is falsely accused of pulling an Easter prank

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is recruited to be a church deacon by the trendy new reverend - but when he starts to embrace the faith a little too seriously, Bart asks Flanders to help him track down their former pastor, the Rev Lovejoy. Meanwhile, the dry cleaners mistakenly swap Marges wedding dress for one of Krustys clown costumes. With the guest voice of Edward Norton

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Cedarwood Holidays in St Keverne, Cornwall, where married couple Kirstie and Joe hope their glamping experience will leave the BandBers green with envy. The guests are pleased with their pristine pods, and the chance to feed seals at a local wildlife sanctuary goes down a treat

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers are still in Cornwall for the weeks second visit, at The Llawnroc Hotel, where former Redcoats Craig and Rachel know what it takes to keep their guests entertained

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers spend a third consecutive visit in Cornwall, at ex-military man Jos The Olde Malthouse in Tintagel, where a number of BandBers are wowed by the heritage charm

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week takes the BandBers to Sherborne in Dorset, and The Britannia Inn, run by husband-and-wife team Lee and Hannah. Doubts about the decor get things off to a bad start for a handful of guests, while the controversial pricing at breakfast leaves Kirstie questioning whether shes getting enough bang for her buck

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Kirstie and Joe from Cedarwood Holidays want to know why not all of their guests would return to their place, before Craig and Rachel ask why not a single BandBer would choose to stay at theirs again. Jo from The Olde Malthouse is keen to mop up his cleanliness complaints, while Hannah and Lee from The Britannia Inn have a gripe with Jo in particular. They then learn the identity of the winner

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Catching up with two sets of house-hunters at different stages of life. In 2019, Alistair and Candice were searching in Swindons pricey old town. Kirstie Allsopp realised that their budget and expectations didnt quite match, so it was going to be a tough search with some hard-hitting compromises. A year earlier, Thomas and Angelina had sold their family home of 32 years and were downsizing in Bolton, to be closer to their family. Phil Spencer returns to find out how both couples have got on since cameras stopped rolling

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Phil catches up with Carol and Andrew from Harrogate, who he first met in 2016 when they were at loggerheads over their beautiful three-bedroom home. Back then, Team Love It Andrews feet were set in concrete and he was adamant that they couldnt find a better location for them and their two children. Carol on the other hand was ready to list. As well as the dated, cramped kitchen, she could see a not-so-distant future where her dad Dennis may need to move into a house that was already bursting at the seams. With three generations to consider, Kirstie came up with an ingenious plan to create the family kitchen and extra bedroom space they needed, working to a budget of £60,000. Phil on the other hand had £475,000 to convince Andrew to up sticks. He showed them three beautiful homes in the Yorkshire countryside, one of which stole Carols heart, and Andrews resolve was seriously tested. But when the dust settled after an emotional decision chat with Kirstie and Phil, who was buying the drinks? Seven years on, Phil finds out if Carol and Andrew stuck to their decision and what they did next

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Alison Hammond presents the show giving people the chance to perform the one song that tells their story - often in front of a crowd for the very first time. Mentors Paloma Faith and Sam Ryder watch and listen to the performances. In the first episode, Alison heads to Liverpool, where a teenager sings Bocelli for the foster mum he cant find words to thank, and a kidney transplant recipient brings Sam and Paloma sprinting out into the downpour. With only one place available at the grand final at Londons Hackney Empire, Sam and Paloma face an impossible choice

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Emmett J Scanlan, Mark Wright, Nella Rose, Mutya Buena and Ralf Little take part in the culinary challenge, with guest judge Cherish Finden joining regulars Paul Hollywood, Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond. The contestants make Signature pull-apart savoury rolls and grapple with vegan fruit tarts in the Technical. And for the Showstopper, the celebs recreate their most ridiculous purchase ever

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Secret Africa: Into the Wild
programme.desc: Explorer Lucy Shepherd self-films as she undertakes a high-risk, on-foot expedition across remote regions of Tanzania alongside an Indigenous Hadza and Akie team. In this first episode, Lucy must adapt to life as a hunter-gatherer and earn the respect of the tribesmen, whose knowledge, skills and understanding of the land will be vital for the expedition

programme.title: Worlds Most Secret Hotels
programme.desc: The worlds most remote and extraordinary hotels. This episode explores Bolivias Salar de Uyuni, a striking brutalist lodge seamlessly blending in with the edge of the worlds largest salt flat. It also features a futuristic getaway of bubble domes in County Fermanagh in Northern Ireland, a mirrored resort overlooking a majestic Norwegian fjord, an art deco hotel nestles amid the Pyrenees, and the extra-terrestrial-inspired design of a unique homestay in Wales

programme.title: Plane (2023)
programme.desc: On New Years Eve, Trailblazer Air pilot Captain Brodie Torrance takes flight with handcuffed prisoner Louis Gaspare on board. A direct lightning strike forces Torrance and co-pilot Dele to emergency land on a remote island under the control of militia leader Junmar. Action thriller, starring Gerard Butler and Mike Colter

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A 50-year-old hairstylist meets a well-travelled nutritionist, a conspiracy theorist is matched with a science teacher and an opera singer serenades his date. A high-energy spin instructor meets a passionate PE teacher. Will sparks fly, or does fate have other plans?

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The contestants get active as Armando Iannucci adopts a new persona to perform a daring stunt, Kumail Nanjiani grapples with bowling pins while wearing oven gloves and Joanna Page attempts a tricky skill she hasnt tried since she was about 12. Meanwhile, a topless Joel Dommett twirls a pretty umbrella and Amy Gledhill has to cope with someone shouting about scrambled eggs. Alex Horne keeps an eye on their progress, while Taskmaster Greg Davies hands out the points - and the put-downs when it all goes wrong

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a mother-and-son team who have gone through 20 chefs in two years at their struggling Italian restaurant in California. The adjoining bar is a triumph, but the oldest dining establishment in town needs an overhaul if the inexperienced owners are to make a profit

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Contestants from in and around Edinburgh vie to host the best dinner party, beginning with competitive couple Michelle and Cameron, who deliver a Spanish-themed first meal. The second day throws up some tuba playing and extreme wine reactions at the home of bad joker Lindsay and his fiancee Tara. Last to host are Lehandra and Joe, who have only been dating for five months and have never thrown a dinner party before

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: Events manager Mitch and kitchen designer Elliot recently bagged themselves a bargain home in Bromley, Kent, and wasted no time in gutting the interior. The only problem is, now they have no idea working out where everything should go and how to add style and proportion while sticking to their monochrome design throughout. Enter George Clarke to give them a few tips. The architect also pays a visit to a workshop where bespoke antique mirrors are made. But will he be able to achieve a distressed effect without getting too distressed himself?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge sees The Bridges of Madison County and begins pining for a little romance to spice up her life, so the family reminisces about impassioned encounters in days gone by. Featuring the guest voices of Michelle Pfeiffer and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Substitute teacher Mrs Cantwell (Tina Fey) takes an instant dislike to Lisa, and vows to give the youngster extra credit if she can figure out why. Meanwhile, Flanders is plagued with guilt after punching Homer. Featuring the guest voice of author Richard Dawkins

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns attempts to fulfil his lifelong ambition of becoming a superhero and take down a rogues gallery of familiar faces, but devoted sidekick Smithers secretly intervenes after noticing his boss isnt quite up to the challenge. Lisa steps in as Barts attorney when he is falsely accused of pulling an Easter prank

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is recruited to be a church deacon by the trendy new reverend - but when he starts to embrace the faith a little too seriously, Bart asks Flanders to help him track down their former pastor, the Rev Lovejoy. Meanwhile, the dry cleaners mistakenly swap Marges wedding dress for one of Krustys clown costumes. With the guest voice of Edward Norton

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug coaches a kids football team, but is persuaded by Deacons son to take up the sport himself. Though Carrie is impressed with his new determination to get into shape, he soon realises how unfit he has become once he takes to the field

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Arthur grows jealous of a new dog on Hollys route, and Doug envies Carries close relationship with a gay colleague, deciding to spend more time with Deacon to get even with her. American comedy, starring Kevin James, Leah Remini and Jerry Stiller

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie grows jealous when she discovers Dougs mother has a healthy relationship with his former girlfriend. American comedy, starring Leah Remini and Lola Glaudini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug goes to confession, where he tells the priest how he took a dirty photo of himself at a wedding - and pinned the blame on Danny when the offending picture was discovered. Meanwhile, Arthur resorts to desperate measures to expose the culprit

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray enlists his mothers help to reassure Ally, who is afraid to sleep in her own room because she is convinced it becomes the haunt of monsters once the lights go out. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie is thrilled to learn that Roberts new girlfriend is a virgin, so Ray tries to convince her that Debra is a good girl too, leading to a revelation from Marie and Frank

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra gets involved in a heated dispute with another parent at Allys little league baseball match, but Ray fails to take her side because he is afraid of making himself unpopular. Dan Castellaneta, better known as the voice of Homer Simpson, guest stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part three of three. As Niles continues to recover from open-heart surgery, he masks his fear of death with overconfidence and an elaborate show of zest for life. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: As the Christmas season draws near, Frasier is furious to learn that Daphne and Niles want to host the family get-together, prompting a feud between the brothers. Meanwhile, Roz finds herself falling for a department store Santa Claus. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by guests Tyler West, Chloe Burrows, Damien Molony, Jessie Ware, Alex James, Paddy Young and Ania Magliano. With music from Skindred

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer, Moe and Lenny go in pursuit of Carl when he skips town with $200,000 in winnings from a lottery ticket he bought with them. However, their search makes them realise how little they know about their friend and almost reaches a dead-end until Lisa points them in the direction of Iceland. Featuring music by Sigur Ros

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge is feeling neglected by Homer, and the timing couldnt be worse as their 10th wedding anniversary is fast approaching. Little does she know her husband is planning a grand romantic gesture inspired by a special moment from their first year of marriage. But wires get crossed when the miffed housewife stumbles upon a dodgy website for couples bored of their partners, and she ends up chatting to the too-good-to-be-true Ben (voiced by Family Guy creator Seth MacFarlane)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge encourages Bart to explore his creative side and signs him up for piano lessons, but the youngster is less than enthusiastic about the prospect until he meets his Russian teacher Zhenya. Meanwhile, Homer is distraught after losing his last two hairs and becoming completely bald. Guest starring the voices of Jane Krakowski, Bill Hader and Justin Bieber

programme.title: George Clarkes Amazing Spaces
programme.sub-title: Touring Theatre and Secret Garden Flat
programme.desc: The presenter and master craftsman Will Hardie come to the end of their architectural world tour of the UK with a delicious taste of Italy in north Wales Portmeirion. The duo complete their most ambitious build yet, bringing the outside in as they unveil their studio flat that also converts into a magical secret garden

programme.title: Sailing the Shipping Forecast with the Rev Richard Coles
programme.desc: Richard meets the rebels and risk takers of the shipping forecast area of the Thames, revisiting his youth as a member of the Communards when he visits Radio Caroline. He also explores the Old Royal Naval College, where he has his first ever sailing lesson. Venturing north to Harwich, Richard meets the maritime pilot bringing one of the worlds biggest container ships into port

programme.title: Our Tiny Islands
programme.desc: In this final edition, cameras follow Wez in St Marys on the Isles of Scilly, whos come up with a unique event - a 60-kilometre race around all five islands in just one day. The programme also takes a look at the island of Piel, which is just off the coast of northwest England, as well as a natural nature reserve on Bardsey Island in Wales

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: In the fold of the foothills of Exmoor, Devon farmers Rob and Sarah Taylor prepare their native ponies for the show season, but first they need to round them up from off the moor. At the southern tip of Cornwall, the South West Coastal Path is under threat of erosion from the thousands of footsteps veering off the marked track each year

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Inside the Worlds Most Luxurious
programme.sub-title: Inside the Worlds Most Luxurious Yachts
programme.desc: Behind the scenes on some of the worlds most extravagant yachts. Cameras follow John Caudwell, the founder of Phones4u, as he takes a family holiday on the high seas, and capture the action at the Superyacht Cup, where the crew of the multi-million-pound monohull yacht The Rose are hoping to win an unprecedented third consecutive victory

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Another batch of celebrities put their baking skills to the test, for charity, with new judge Caroline Waldegrave joining Paul Hollywood, Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond. Married couple Chris and Rosie Ramsey go up against each other, alongside a sibling rivalry, as Scarlette Douglas squares up to her brother Stuart. The celebs make tea-time classic scones, before taking on a chocolatey old-school favourite and recreating their career highlight in cake

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Alison Hammond takes the pop-up stage to Edinburgh. A woman sings an Etta James number for the bus driver who left her a handwritten note and drove away, a 22-year-old performs his mums favourite song, a former soldier sings the Zach Bryan track that helped him through PTSD, and a hospital volunteer sings A Fond Kiss by Robert Burns for a D-Day veteran on his 100th birthday

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The viewers check out Secret Garden, Love on the Spectrum, Celebrity Bridge of Lies, Gordon Ramsays Secret Service, The Housemaid and Conspiracies and Coverups

programme.title: Chernobyl: Days That Shocked the World
programme.desc: Part two of two. The second half of the documentary examines the cause of the disaster, and how the Soviet authorities quickly pointed the finger at operator error, intentionally concealing a flaw with the reactor design. Plus, a look at how the conflict between Ukraine and Russia risks unleashing further radiation by damaging the hastily built shelter entombing the wreckage

programme.title: Gordon Ramsays Secret Service
programme.desc: The no-nonsense chef sets out to help restaurants in need - by spying on them using a state-of-the-art surveillance system and with the help of a mole on the inside. For his first mission, he gains a 360-degree view of Parthenon, a family run Greek restaurant in Washington, DC. It was once a pillar of the community but its decor, utilities and hygiene are severely lacking. Gordon sets out to give owner Pete the tools he needs to improve the eatery so he can hand over the reins to his son

programme.title: Gordon Ramsays Secret Service
programme.desc: Gordon visits the Italian bistro Caffe Boa, where he exposes the toxic working relationship between husband-and-wife owners Patrick and Jenny. Can he change Patricks ways to save his business - and his marriage?

programme.title: Outrageous Homes
programme.desc: Interior design expert Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen celebrates great British visionaries, cherished eccentrics and proud-to-be-different homeowners. He begins by meeting Dawn, whose home was once owned by millionaire publisher Felix Dennis. Felix built the impressive barn on a party theme, with swashbuckling pirates and real palm trees. The house itself is set around an indoor gigantic swimming pool. Laurence also meets Billy, who has converted his cottage garden into a Wild West ranch with its very own saloon moonshine and catches up with 1970s-fanatic Estelle, who treats him to the furnishing delights of her beloved decade

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: Albert and Kristina have moved into a coach house in Leamington Spa which was last decorated in the 1980s with a mock medieval style. With a baby on the way, the couple are desperate to make their new home into something special - so George kicks off by knocking a huge hole in the ceiling for extra headspace. Will his other ideas prove just as exciting? The architect also visits a 200-year-old farmhouse on the edge of the Peak District, where he faces difficulties as the owners are reluctant to let him knock down any walls

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three pairs of partners from Manchester compete to win the £1,000 prize, including married couple of 19 years Fiona and Ian, who kick off the competition with a Spanish-inspired meal. Later, young newlyweds Lauren and Pete shock their guests with a mature and refined menu, before Karl and Mukta serve up Indian-themed dishes alongside a few surprises

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Highlights of the food and chat show, with Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The contestants get active as Armando Iannucci adopts a new persona to perform a daring stunt, Kumail Nanjiani grapples with bowling pins while wearing oven gloves and Joanna Page attempts a tricky skill she hasnt tried since she was about 12. Meanwhile, a topless Joel Dommett twirls a pretty umbrella and Amy Gledhill has to cope with someone shouting about scrambled eggs. Alex Horne keeps an eye on their progress, while Taskmaster Greg Davies hands out the points - and the put-downs when it all goes wrong

programme.title: Miss Peregrines Home for Peculiar Children (2016)
programme.desc: A boy investigates a series of clues left by his grandfather, and comes across a home for children with special powers, that has been concealed from the world using time travel. It falls to the boy to protect the home and its residents from a race of invisible monsters. Fantasy adventure based on the novel by Ransom Riggs, starring Eva Green, Asa Butterfield, Samuel L Jackson and Terence Stamp

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Tower View Hotel, in Blackpool, where owner Jennifer McGirr is joined by friend Diana Carnegie. Daniel Walker and George Gillespie find some unwanted guests in the bathroom and trouble arises at breakfast when some of the guests try ordering off-menu

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit Church Spa in East Markham in Nottinghamshire on their second evening, where proprietor Daniel Walker and family friend George Gillespie hope to wow their guests with their relaxing facilities. Steve and Lisa Tindall seem impressed, but Jennifer and Diana Carnegie question the high price tag

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third hosts of the week are Steve and Lisa Tindall, who own the Kings Head Inn in Rye, East Sussex, where they hope their guests will fall for their boutique BandB. They get into the swing of things with a round of blindfolded mini-golf, but not everyone gets a solid nights sleep afterwards

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Former breakfast TV presenter Matt Arnold welcomes the contestants to The Bridge Hotel Brandon in Suffolk, and hopes that his mantra of beautiful beds, blissful bathrooms and brilliant breakfasts shines through. The group takes part in a rowing competition in the afternoon, but delays at breakfast and a runny egg cause irritation

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hosts meet for the final time to find out what they have been paid and confront their critics, and things get heated when its time to count up the cash

programme.title: Kirsties House of Craft
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp makes a fun garland from paper, a spring wreath and a string-art hot-air balloon

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie and Doug book an appointment for Arthur to see a psychotherapist but soon find they are the ones needing treatment as they try to sort their problems out. Comedy, guest starring William Hurt and Ben Stiller

Mentors Paloma Faith and Sam Ryder watch and listen to the performances. In the first episode, Alison heads to Liverpool, where a teenager sings Bocelli for the foster mum he cant find words to thank, and a kidney transplant recipient brings Sam and Paloma sprinting out into the downpour. With only one place available at the grand final at Londons Hackney Empire, Sam and Paloma face an impossible choice

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Emmett J Scanlan, Mark Wright, Nella Rose, Mutya Buena and Ralf Little take part in the culinary challenge, with guest judge Cherish Finden joining regulars Paul Hollywood, Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond. The contestants make Signature pull-apart savoury rolls and grapple with vegan fruit tarts in the Technical. And for the Showstopper, the celebs recreate their most ridiculous purchase ever

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Secret Africa: Into the Wild
programme.desc: Explorer Lucy Shepherd self-films as she undertakes a high-risk, on-foot expedition across remote regions of Tanzania alongside an Indigenous Hadza and Akie team. In this first episode, Lucy must adapt to life as a hunter-gatherer and earn the respect of the tribesmen, whose knowledge, skills and understanding of the land will be vital for the expedition

programme.title: Worlds Most Secret Hotels
programme.desc: The worlds most remote and extraordinary hotels. This episode explores Bolivias Salar de Uyuni, a striking brutalist lodge seamlessly blending in with the edge of the worlds largest salt flat. It also features a futuristic getaway of bubble domes in County Fermanagh in Northern Ireland, a mirrored resort overlooking a majestic Norwegian fjord, an art deco hotel nestles amid the Pyrenees, and the extra-terrestrial-inspired design of a unique homestay in Wales

programme.title: Plane (2023)
programme.desc: On New Years Eve, Trailblazer Air pilot Captain Brodie Torrance takes flight with handcuffed prisoner Louis Gaspare on board. A direct lightning strike forces Torrance and co-pilot Dele to emergency land on a remote island under the control of militia leader Junmar. Action thriller, starring Gerard Butler and Mike Colter

programme.title: Commando (1985)
programme.desc: The daughter of retired special forces officer John Matrix is kidnapped by an old comrade-in-arms, now in league with a deposed former dictator. The tyrant plans to use the girl to force Matrix into assassinating the head of the country he once ruled, but is unprepared for the lengths to which the veteran soldier will go to rescue his child. Action adventure, with Arnold Schwarzenegger and Rae Dawn Chong

programme.title: Gordon Ramsays Secret Service
programme.desc: The no-nonsense chef sets out to help restaurants in need - by spying on them using a state-of-the-art surveillance system and with the help of a mole on the inside. For his first mission, he gains a 360-degree view of Parthenon, a family run Greek restaurant in Washington, DC. It was once a pillar of the community but its decor, utilities and hygiene are severely lacking. Gordon sets out to give owner Pete the tools he needs to improve the eatery so he can hand over the reins to his son

programme.title: Gordon Ramsays Secret Service
programme.desc: Gordon visits the Italian bistro Caffe Boa, where he exposes the toxic working relationship between husband-and-wife owners Patrick and Jenny. Can he change Patricks ways to save his business - and his marriage?

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a mother-and-son team who have gone through 20 chefs in two years at their struggling Italian restaurant in California. The adjoining bar is a triumph, but the oldest dining establishment in town needs an overhaul if the inexperienced owners are to make a profit

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Contestants from in and around Edinburgh vie to host the best dinner party, beginning with competitive couple Michelle and Cameron, who deliver a Spanish-themed first meal. The second day throws up some tuba playing and extreme wine reactions at the home of bad joker Lindsay and his fiancee Tara. Last to host are Lehandra and Joe, who have only been dating for five months and have never thrown a dinner party before

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: Events manager Mitch and kitchen designer Elliot recently bagged themselves a bargain home in Bromley, Kent, and wasted no time in gutting the interior. The only problem is, now they have no idea working out where everything should go and how to add style and proportion while sticking to their monochrome design throughout. Enter George Clarke to give them a few tips. The architect also pays a visit to a workshop where bespoke antique mirrors are made. But will he be able to achieve a distressed effect without getting too distressed himself?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge sees The Bridges of Madison County and begins pining for a little romance to spice up her life, so the family reminisces about impassioned encounters in days gone by. Featuring the guest voices of Michelle Pfeiffer and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Substitute teacher Mrs Cantwell (Tina Fey) takes an instant dislike to Lisa, and vows to give the youngster extra credit if she can figure out why. Meanwhile, Flanders is plagued with guilt after punching Homer. Featuring the guest voice of author Richard Dawkins

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns attempts to fulfil his lifelong ambition of becoming a superhero and take down a rogues gallery of familiar faces, but devoted sidekick Smithers secretly intervenes after noticing his boss isnt quite up to the challenge. Lisa steps in as Barts attorney when he is falsely accused of pulling an Easter prank

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is recruited to be a church deacon by the trendy new reverend - but when he starts to embrace the faith a little too seriously, Bart asks Flanders to help him track down their former pastor, the Rev Lovejoy. Meanwhile, the dry cleaners mistakenly swap Marges wedding dress for one of Krustys clown costumes. With the guest voice of Edward Norton

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug coaches a kids football team, but is persuaded by Deacons son to take up the sport himself. Though Carrie is impressed with his new determination to get into shape, he soon realises how unfit he has become once he takes to the field

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Arthur grows jealous of a new dog on Hollys route, and Doug envies Carries close relationship with a gay colleague, deciding to spend more time with Deacon to get even with her. American comedy, starring Kevin James, Leah Remini and Jerry Stiller

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie grows jealous when she discovers Dougs mother has a healthy relationship with his former girlfriend. American comedy, starring Leah Remini and Lola Glaudini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug goes to confession, where he tells the priest how he took a dirty photo of himself at a wedding - and pinned the blame on Danny when the offending picture was discovered. Meanwhile, Arthur resorts to desperate measures to expose the culprit

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray enlists his mothers help to reassure Ally, who is afraid to sleep in her own room because she is convinced it becomes the haunt of monsters once the lights go out. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie is thrilled to learn that Roberts new girlfriend is a virgin, so Ray tries to convince her that Debra is a good girl too, leading to a revelation from Marie and Frank

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra gets involved in a heated dispute with another parent at Allys little league baseball match, but Ray fails to take her side because he is afraid of making himself unpopular. Dan Castellaneta, better known as the voice of Homer Simpson, guest stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part three of three. As Niles continues to recover from open-heart surgery, he masks his fear of death with overconfidence and an elaborate show of zest for life. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: As the Christmas season draws near, Frasier is furious to learn that Daphne and Niles want to host the family get-together, prompting a feud between the brothers. Meanwhile, Roz finds herself falling for a department store Santa Claus. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by guests Tyler West, Chloe Burrows, Damien Molony, Jessie Ware, Alex James, Paddy Young and Ania Magliano. With music from Skindred

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer, Moe and Lenny go in pursuit of Carl when he skips town with $200,000 in winnings from a lottery ticket he bought with them. However, their search makes them realise how little they know about their friend and almost reaches a dead-end until Lisa points them in the direction of Iceland. Featuring music by Sigur Ros

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge is feeling neglected by Homer, and the timing couldnt be worse as their 10th wedding anniversary is fast approaching. Little does she know her husband is planning a grand romantic gesture inspired by a special moment from their first year of marriage. But wires get crossed when the miffed housewife stumbles upon a dodgy website for couples bored of their partners, and she ends up chatting to the too-good-to-be-true Ben (voiced by Family Guy creator Seth MacFarlane)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge encourages Bart to explore his creative side and signs him up for piano lessons, but the youngster is less than enthusiastic about the prospect until he meets his Russian teacher Zhenya. Meanwhile, Homer is distraught after losing his last two hairs and becoming completely bald. Guest starring the voices of Jane Krakowski, Bill Hader and Justin Bieber

programme.title: George Clarkes Amazing Spaces
programme.sub-title: Touring Theatre and Secret Garden Flat
programme.desc: The presenter and master craftsman Will Hardie come to the end of their architectural world tour of the UK with a delicious taste of Italy in north Wales Portmeirion. The duo complete their most ambitious build yet, bringing the outside in as they unveil their studio flat that also converts into a magical secret garden

programme.title: Sailing the Shipping Forecast with the Rev Richard Coles
programme.desc: Richard meets the rebels and risk takers of the shipping forecast area of the Thames, revisiting his youth as a member of the Communards when he visits Radio Caroline. He also explores the Old Royal Naval College, where he has his first ever sailing lesson. Venturing north to Harwich, Richard meets the maritime pilot bringing one of the worlds biggest container ships into port

programme.title: Our Tiny Islands
programme.desc: In this final edition, cameras follow Wez in St Marys on the Isles of Scilly, whos come up with a unique event - a 60-kilometre race around all five islands in just one day. The programme also takes a look at the island of Piel, which is just off the coast of northwest England, as well as a natural nature reserve on Bardsey Island in Wales

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: In the fold of the foothills of Exmoor, Devon farmers Rob and Sarah Taylor prepare their native ponies for the show season, but first they need to round them up from off the moor. At the southern tip of Cornwall, the South West Coastal Path is under threat of erosion from the thousands of footsteps veering off the marked track each year

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Inside the Worlds Most Luxurious
programme.sub-title: Inside the Worlds Most Luxurious Yachts
programme.desc: Behind the scenes on some of the worlds most extravagant yachts. Cameras follow John Caudwell, the founder of Phones4u, as he takes a family holiday on the high seas, and capture the action at the Superyacht Cup, where the crew of the multi-million-pound monohull yacht The Rose are hoping to win an unprecedented third consecutive victory

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Another batch of celebrities put their baking skills to the test, for charity, with new judge Caroline Waldegrave joining Paul Hollywood, Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond. Married couple Chris and Rosie Ramsey go up against each other, alongside a sibling rivalry, as Scarlette Douglas squares up to her brother Stuart. The celebs make tea-time classic scones, before taking on a chocolatey old-school favourite and recreating their career highlight in cake

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Alison Hammond takes the pop-up stage to Edinburgh. A woman sings an Etta James number for the bus driver who left her a handwritten note and drove away, a 22-year-old performs his mums favourite song, a former soldier sings the Zach Bryan track that helped him through PTSD, and a hospital volunteer sings A Fond Kiss by Robert Burns for a D-Day veteran on his 100th birthday

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The viewers check out Secret Garden, Love on the Spectrum, Celebrity Bridge of Lies, Gordon Ramsays Secret Service, The Housemaid and Conspiracies and Coverups

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A 50-year-old hairstylist meets a well-travelled nutritionist, a conspiracy theorist is matched with a science teacher and an opera singer serenades his date. A high-energy spin instructor meets a passionate PE teacher. Will sparks fly, or does fate have other plans?

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Some of Britains best-known personalities appraise recent TV shows including Squid Game, Glastonbury, Open House: The Great Sex Experiment, Celebrity Bridge of Lies, Trainwreck: Poop Cruise, Millionaire Hoarders and Gary Barlows Food and Wine Tour: Australia

programme.title: Outrageous Homes
programme.desc: Interior design expert Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen celebrates great British visionaries, cherished eccentrics and proud-to-be-different homeowners. He begins by meeting Dawn, whose home was once owned by millionaire publisher Felix Dennis. Felix built the impressive barn on a party theme, with swashbuckling pirates and real palm trees. The house itself is set around an indoor gigantic swimming pool. Laurence also meets Billy, who has converted his cottage garden into a Wild West ranch with its very own saloon moonshine and catches up with 1970s-fanatic Estelle, who treats him to the furnishing delights of her beloved decade

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: Albert and Kristina have moved into a coach house in Leamington Spa which was last decorated in the 1980s with a mock medieval style. With a baby on the way, the couple are desperate to make their new home into something special - so George kicks off by knocking a huge hole in the ceiling for extra headspace. Will his other ideas prove just as exciting? The architect also visits a 200-year-old farmhouse on the edge of the Peak District, where he faces difficulties as the owners are reluctant to let him knock down any walls

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three pairs of partners from Manchester compete to win the £1,000 prize, including married couple of 19 years Fiona and Ian, who kick off the competition with a Spanish-inspired meal. Later, young newlyweds Lauren and Pete shock their guests with a mature and refined menu, before Karl and Mukta serve up Indian-themed dishes alongside a few surprises

programme.desc: Kimball decides to take the sin out of Clementine and invites her to a Christian singles get-together

programme.desc: Warriors celebrate a beheading, a prisoner tries to trick his guard, and a young man is confronted for only speaking in catchphrases

programme.desc: Tony is reluctantly dragged in when the developer of an inner-city building project decides he wants to double the height of his apartments - and then triple it again

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: In an hour-long special Joe, Sal, Murr and Q head to Hawaii, where the guys pose as fortune tellers and practise indecent proposals at a romantic waterfall

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Princess Leia Fantasy
programme.desc: Ross foolishly lets Rachel in on his most secret sexual fantasy, while Phoebe consoles a heartbroken Monica and Chandler gets involved with an old flame whom Joey cannot stand. David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where No Ones Ready
programme.desc: Ross is due to make an important speech at the museum, and invites the gang along for moral support - but bickering and personal problems soon threaten to make him late. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe is alarmed to learn she has attracted the unwanted attentions of a stalker, and Monica comes up with a plan to deal with her broodiness. American comedy, guest starring David Arquette, with Lisa Kudrow and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Metaphorical Tunnel
programme.desc: Chandler ponders the importance of commitment, Monica starts work in a restaurant and Phoebes home truths make her an unpopular choice as Joeys agent. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Actress Isabella Rossellini makes Rosss day by dropping into Central Perk for a coffee. Phoebes efforts to introduce her half-brother to the city give him the wrong idea about her line of work. Comedy, with David Schwimmer, Lisa Kudrow and Giovanni Ribisi

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Janice persuades the pals to reveal their deepest, darkest secrets about a period in their relationships three years earlier. programme.sub-title: The One with the Race Car Bed
programme.desc: Monica buys a bed from Janices husband but the wrong one is delivered. Joey gets a job teaching a soap opera acting class, while Rachel tries to ease the tension between Ross and her father

programme.sub-title: The One with the Giant Poking Device
programme.desc: Phoebe convinces herself she is a walking jinx who keeps causing people to die mysteriously. Monica hides the fact that Ben has been injured, while Chandler and Janice make a tough decision about their relationship

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The gang holds an American football match on Thanksgiving. Opposing team captains Ross and Monica relive their sibling rivalry on the pitch, while Joey tries to outflank Chandler

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel hands in her notice at Central Perk, while Ross accidentally breaks a girls leg and ends up having to go door to door peddling cookies. Joey starts a new job selling Christmas trees, but Phoebe thinks it is a cruel trade and sets about saving the merchandise

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Cant Remember Which Sister
programme.desc: Rachels attractive and influential new friend sends Ross into a jealous frenzy, while Chandler gets drunk and falls for the curvaceous charms of one of Joeys many sisters - but later cannot remember which one

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Jealousy
programme.desc: Ross becomes increasingly jealous of Rachels new workmate, and Joey auditions for a Broadway musical - even though he cannot dance. Meanwhile, Monica falls for a would-be poet

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Monica and Richard Are Just Friends

programme.title: Friends

programme.desc: Ross tries to prevent Rachel discovering he slept with Chloe from the photocopying shop, but she finds out anyway and a major argument ensues at her apartment. Trapped in Monicas bedroom, the other friends cannot help overhearing everything

programme.sub-title: The One with the Hypnosis Tape
programme.desc: Phoebe is shocked to discover her half-brother Frank is planning to marry a woman more than twice his age. Chandler tries to stop smoking with the aid of hypnosis, only to suffer strange side-effects, and Monica gets a handy tip that could net her a small fortune

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Tiny T-Shirt

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey meets Miss Right, and Rachel is dismayed to learn her boss has started dating Chandler. Meanwhile, Monica inherits a dolls house, filling Phoebe with jealousy

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad

Before heading home, the pair look back on some of their favourite moments from the trip

programme.desc: The comedian hosts another evening of entertainment at Londons Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his 20-year-old son Barney hit the road together, travelling more than 2,000 miles from Los Angeles to New Orleans. The pair begin their journey in Los Angeles, and head down to Muscle Beach to lift weights, before taking part in a game of volleyball. The following day, Bradley is terrified to hear that the agenda involves a 14,000ft skydive

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: Actor Bradley Walsh and his 20-year-old son Barney hit the road together, travelling more than 2,000 miles from Los Angeles to New Orleans. In the second leg of their journey, the pair leave the city of Los Angeles behind and make their way down the famous Route 66 to the southwestern state of Arizona. Here, they ride through a deserted ghost town, before the father and son reach Lake Havasu City, where Barney has arranged for them to try jet-skiing. Finally, they attend a Cowboy College, where they learn to become real-life horsemen

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son Barney arrive in Texas, where they enjoy driving around in tanks, experience space travel in a centrifuge and hear campfire tales about UFOs. First up, the pair undertake some centrifuge training, which is used to prepare astronauts for the crushing gravitational forces produced at take-off from the extreme exhilaration. They also head to the outskirts of Houston to meet some UFO enthusiasts who investigate claimed sightings of extra-terrestrials, and are gripped by stories of spaceships blocking roads and people being taken by aliens for experiments

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son Barney embark on the final leg of their journey, which sees the pair arrive in the Louisiana city of New Orleans. Here, they visit a spiritual voodoo priest for a spot of energy cleansing, and feed alligators in the Bayou with Captain Billy, who knows every corner of the wetlands, having been born and raised on the bayous of South Louisiana. Later, Bradley hops on board the Natchez jazz Steamboat, before the pair take to the streets to lead a spectacular parade with a six-piece band

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor Bradley Walsh and his son Barney return for a second series as they embark on another road trip across America together, beginning their journey in Florida, the southernmost point of the country. From there, the pair head to the Palm Beach International Raceway, before getting up close and personal with sharks

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: For the next leg of their journey, the actor and his son head to the Great Smoky Mountains on the Tennessee-North Carolina border, where they go canoeing on the iconic rapids that featured in the film Deliverance. With Bradley left in need of a whisky, they head to a Hillbilly Jam for a nightcap and to experience the mountain tradition of clog dancing, before the pair try their hand at chopping wood with some competitive lumberjacks and taking to the woods to search for a mythical mountain beast

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: For the next leg of their journey, Bradley and Barney visit the Red River Gorge in Kentucky, before heading to the supposedly haunted Poasttown Elementary School in Middletown, Ohio. The next day, they travel to Louisville, birthplace of legendary boxer Muhammad Ali, where they follow in his footsteps by sparring at the local boxing gym. At the end of a long day, Barney rewards his dad with a well-earned meal at a KFC restaurant in Kentucky - the home state of the chains founder Colonel Harland Sanders

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The Chase presenter Bradley Walsh and his son Barney return for a second series as they embark on another road trip across America together. This time, the actor and his son arrive in Ohio, where they head for Dayton - the birthplace of aviation - before the pair attend a local rodeo later that evening. Brad soon realises that they are not just there to spectate on the sport, they are also expected to take part. However, a nasty fall from an angry bull means Brad spends the rest of the night in hospital

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.desc: In east Lancashire, newly engaged Andrew and Sue offer a menu of classic tried and tested dishes. Joining them are laid back Ben and Ruth, and drama lovers Helen and Victoria. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Nottinghamshire, Nena and her husband Vish kick off the competition with an Indian feast. Day two sees Syreeta and laid-back Romaine host an evening. The post-meal planking contest proves a hit, but Romaines romantic crooning hits a bum note. Finally its the turn of Vicki and her husband Paul to try to see off the competition and bag themselves the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Dele is given £12,000 and three weeks to plan the perfect wedding for his fiancee Tracy. After a 15-year engagement, Tracy is seeking nothing less than her dream of a romantic castle as the venue for her big day, but Dele seems more concerned about arranging a ceremony with a dramatic twist - inspired by his favourite soap opera

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Comic book-loving groom Anthony wants to prove he can be a real superhero to bride-to-be Lauren, by organising a comic-inspired wedding in a cave. However, with Lauren hoping for a traditional affair, Anthony has his work cut out to convince her family that his theme will prove successful

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Raphael is given £12,000 to plan his wedding to his fiancee Ola, and decides to arrange not one but two ceremonies - a church blessing followed by a large-scale traditional Nigerian celebration. Bride-to-be Ola has been dreaming of a small, intimate occasion, so Raphaels double-feature idea might come as a shock, but if the big day is to get off the ground, the laid-back groom must overcome his habit of leaving everything to the last minute - including the booking of a suitable church

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Romantically hopeless groom-to-be Dan has three weeks and £12,000 to plan the perfect wedding for his future wife Kate. He wants to prove he can be romantic by pulling off a dramatic wedding hundreds of miles away in Italy. However, his vision is worlds away from Kates dream of a traditional fairy tale wedding surrounded by family and friends

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be and survival enthusiast Tom plans an outdoor wedding on a remote Scottish island, and wants to put his survival skills to the test with a woodland ceremony and a rugged reception. However, his future bride Sue dreams of a traditional wedding day in a stately home

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: John Wilson, the President and Chief Operating Officer of Rollins Incorporated - the parent company of eight pest-control firms including flagship brand Orkin - goes undercover. He poses as a contestant on a reality TV competition who is trying to win money for his own business, and works alongside his employees to make sure the organisation is heading for another century of keeping homes rodent-free

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Randy DeWitt, the CEO and co-founder of bar and grill chain Twin Peaks, goes undercover to find out whether the companys culture is keeping up with its rapid growth. Posing as a contestant on a reality TV competition, he works among his own staff

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for West Babylon, New York, to help the inexperienced owners of restaurant Classic American deal with their escalating debts. The chef struggles to cope with disorganised staff and an unappealing menu, but quickly realises the real problem lies in the kitchen, where a lack of leadership and communication is causing serious trouble

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island. The no-nonsense chef struggles to persuade hot-headed owner Abby to make his suggested changes, and a confrontation results in him being thrown out of the building in the middle of a dinner service. The eaterys co-owner and financier begs Gordon to return, but his success hinges on his ability to win Abby over

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for the Grasshopper Also in Carlstadt, New Jersey, a family-owned Irish restaurant. There, he lends a helping hand to Mitch Sandler, who has been struggling to live up to the expectations of his father-in-law since he invested heavily in the business. The chef also tries to improve the presentation of dishes emerging from the kitchen

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. The eaterys decline began when one of the pair started embezzling money to fund his prescription drug addiction, and things only got worse when the he was sentenced to four years in prison. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brothers trust before he can save their business

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Bridgeport, Connecticut, to visit Cafe Tavolini, which is being neglected by husband and wife managers teetering on the edge of divorce. The estranged couples two children are struggling to save the business from their parents disputes, and the visiting chef tries to shock the pair into stopping the restaurant from becoming a casualty of their quarrel

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

programme.desc: Car mad groom-to-be Adam brings the two loves of his life together, by organising a wedding ceremony for his fiancee Victoria in the middle of a car show. programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Kyle plans a demolition derby style wedding, complete with an old banger, a race track, and a rented wedding dress. However, his fiancee Katie dreams of the exact opposite - she wants a traditional affair with a perfect dress to match

programme.desc: Jane Grote Abell, the Chairwoman of Donatos Pizza and daughter of the companys founder, poses as a contestant on a reality TV show who is trying to win money to open her own restaurant. programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to New Orleans to visit Zekes, a much-loved restaurant that has seen standards slip since the original owner died. The new proprietors, husband and wife duo Darryl and Ellen Cortello, focused all the efforts on the financial side of things, so it is up to Gordon to show them that they first need to love food to make any profit

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Los Angeles to help La Frite, an outdated French restaurant that is failing to make any profits. His first step is to try to reconcile the feuding family members who run the business, and so devises a plan to bring them together by using secret filming

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.sub-title: Lido, Anna Vincenzos and Le Bistro
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the restaurants he tried to save, returning to Lido, Anna Vincenzos and Le Bistro to find out whether his advice has been put to good use

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Pasadena, California, where he visits Jamaican-themed restaurant Cafe Kingston. programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Eagle Rock in California to try to change the fortunes of Capri, a grubby restaurant that often remains closed during lunchtime because of the twin owners lazy attitude. programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped

Meanwhile, a topless Joel Dommett twirls a pretty umbrella, and someone shouts about scrambled eggs to Amy Gledhill. Greg Davies rules his kingdom with his customary combination of ferocity and occasional kindness, while Alex Horne offers his undying adoration and unquestioning support. programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: With the rising cost of food and energy, Jamie Oliver is on a mission to make delicious dishes that wont break the budget

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates how to prepare nutritious meals on a budget, offering tips on keeping costs down and wasting less food. Beginning with recipes that work out at less than £1.80 a portion, he cooks up a roast brisket of beef with all the trimmings, Korean stir-fried rice, and sweet pea fish pie, before showing a takeaway lover how to make his favourite treat for a fraction of the price of ordering it in

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates how to prepare nutritious meals for an average of £1.30 a portion. He cooks a roast half shoulder of pork with all the trimmings before turning the leftovers into dim sum buns, and rustles up meatloaf with spaghetti and a tomato and chilli sauce. The chef also shows a takeaway lover how to make a vegetable korma with cauliflower pilau for a fraction of the price of ordering it in, and helps a woman put all the meat in her freezer to good use instead of wasting it

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by Michelin-starred chef Kenny Atkinson in Northumberland, where the pair learn how mead is made on Holy Island. James cooks up a Singapore-inspired crab and lobster dish on a stunning beach, before he and Kenny enjoy a cruise around Coquet Island, which is an RSPB reserve

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by Michelin-starred chef Lisa Goodwin-Allen on a visit to the Isle of Man during the warm-up week for the famous TT race. James serves up proper biker food - pork burgers with a spicy apple sauce - and picks up some local Manx kippers to make soup. Lisa visits local organic juice producers before James joins TT legend John McGuinness as he and his team prepare for the race, treating the bikers to lamb chops with hispi cabbage and an olive glaze

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go Local
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King visit a vegetarian Indian restaurant on the outskirts of Bradford. Its run by a husband-and-wife team aiming for a Michelin star

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go Local
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King visit the Stackpole Inn in Pembrokeshire, a multi award-winning gastro pub. Owners Gary and Becky first took it on 15 years ago, and were joined in 2019 by head chef Matt Waldron. Its the Bikers mission to introduce Matt and team Stackpole to the fantastic local food producers that arent yet on their radar

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go Local
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King are in Northumberland, enjoying its stunning coastline and rugged landscapes. The duo visit Hjem, a Michelin-starred restaurant located within the Hadrian Hotel and run by Scandinavian-born chef Alex and his partner Ally, whos front of house. Its the Bikers job to help Alex and Ally connect with new, local producers, ones that can inspire award-winning cuisine

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers are hoping for a Hollywood handshake this week as they tackle bread, the steely-eyed judges speciality. They begin by putting their stamp on a pizza, then are asked to make a classic pastry in the technical challenge. For the showstopper, they tackle the decorative Swedish sandwich cake the smorgåstårta. Who will claim star baker - and who will be hanging up their apron?

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers take on three challenges exploring authentic Mexican bakes, as they put their twist on the classic sweet bread pan dulce for the Signature, tackle a Mexican street food staple in the Technical, and make their own showstopping version of the milk-soaked tres leches cake. Which bakers will impress Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood enough to keep their place in the tent, and who will be heading home? Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas host dessert week, which sees the amateur bakers attempting a trio of sticky challenges. They get all steamed up in the signature, tackle a classic lemon meringue in the technical and for the showstopper are tasked with creating a sponge cake with a surprise inside. Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood are on hand to taste the results - and decide who will be leaving this week

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off

The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: Manchester mother and daughter Adele and Molly, Stoke-on-Trent couple Anita and Alex, and Leeds-based sisters Dominique and Tahiela try to work out words that appear in the Lingo grids and Puzzlewords. Presented by Adil Ray

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: A team of five friends from Morecambe answer questions about top 10 lists, before going for the big money in the final round. Hosted by Warwick Davis

programme.title: The Floor
programme.desc: The competition is heating up with just 57 players left as Rob Brydon hosts another tense round of quick-fire quiz duels, with each win expanding a players territory, while each loss sends another home. With a £5,000 Floor bonus on the line and a £50,000 jackpot up for grabs at the end of the series, its all to play for as friends turn to foes and challenge one another

programme.title: Riddiculous
programme.desc: Ranvir Singh hosts the quiz where contestants take on Riddlemaster Henry Lewis in an attempt to solve a series of riddles - packed with themed general knowledge questions and confusing conundrums, only one team can make it through to the high-stakes final with a chance to win an exciting cash prize. How will Faisal and Daniel, Sara and Kaitlin, and Vicki and Richard cope under pressure?

programme.title: Deal or No Deal

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: A scientist demands $10million after killing the inhabitants of an entire town. First episode of the hit sci-fi saga, starring Lee Majors and Richard Anderson

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve and Oscar are marooned on a Pacific island with a ruthless assassin. Classic 1970s fantasy adventure, starring Lee Majors and Richard Anderson

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: A young woman with ESP abilities helps Steve search the Everglades for a missing scientist. Fantasy adventure, starring Lee Majors and Pamela Franklin

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: The bionic hero faces a killer robot. Action adventure, starring Lee Majors, Richard Anderson and John Saxon

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve uses his strength to repair a damaged aircraft in order to escape an African nation with filmed proof of UN treaty violations

programme.title: Danger Within (1959)
programme.desc: British officers detained in an Italian PoW camp intend to escape, but an informer threatens to scupper their audacious plan. The group is forced to make haste with its scheme when one of the officers is sentenced to death as German soldiers prepare to take over the facility. Second World War drama, starring Richard Todd, Bernard Lee, Michael Wilding, Richard Attenborough and Donald Houston

programme.title: The Spy Who Came in from the Cold (1965)
programme.desc: A burnt-out British spy is ordered to venture undercover in East Germany. He begins by faking his resignation and subsequent alcoholic depression to dupe the enemy into trusting him, but, as he becomes further embroiled in his mission, he comes to realise that he is merely a pawn. Espionage thriller, based on John Le Carres novel, starring Richard Burton, Claire Bloom, Oskar Werner and Peter Van Eyck

programme.title: Apache Uprising (1965)
programme.desc: Western, starring Rory Calhoun as a tough-talking cowboy with a heart of gold who bravely defends fellow stagecoach passengers from a potentially lethal Indian attack. Also starring Corinne Calvet, Lon Chaney Jr and John Russell

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An old man insists that his family gather round his deathbed wearing Mardi Gras masks

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.sub-title: I Am the Night, Colour Me Black
programme.desc: On the day an idealistic young man is to be executed for the murder of a bigot, the sun fails to shine on a small Western town. William Shatner stars

programme.title: Mr and Mrs Smith (2005)
programme.desc: An outwardly bored suburban couple lead double lives as professional assassins, both unaware of their partners secret. When they are hired to kill each other, the deadly situation puts some much-needed excitement back into their stale relationship. Comedy adventure, starring Brad Pitt, Angelina Jolie, Vince Vaughn and Adam Brody

programme.title: Hitman (2007)
programme.desc: A genetically engineered assassin, who exists at the beck and call of a mysterious organisation, fails in his latest mission, and becomes a target himself, as security forces worldwide become aware of his existence and a rival agent is assigned to tie up loose ends. Action thriller, starring Timothy Olyphant, Dougray Scott and Olga Kurylenko

programme.title: Stratton (2017)
programme.desc: A British Special Boat Service commando tracks down an international terrorist cell. Thriller, starring Dominic Cooper, Austin Stowell and Gemma Chan

programme.title: The Legend of the Seven Golden Vampires (1974)
programme.desc: Professor Van Helsing visits the Far East, where he discovers arch-enemy Dracula has risen from the grave yet again to become the driving force behind a Chinese vampire cult. Kung-fu horror from Hammer, starring Peter Cushing, David Chiang, Julie Ege and John Forbes-Robertson
