programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: Crooks kidnap the teenage son of one of Romanos Vietnam War comrades and force him to help them break into a the premises of a liquor distribution company. Vintage American drama, starring William Shatner and Adrian Zmed

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: Romano confides in his new girlfriend, unaware she is passing sensitive information on to a gang of thieves who specialise in stealing expensive furs. William Shatner and Adrian Zmed star

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: Stacy agrees to act as a decoy and puts her life on the line in the course of duty. Eighties police drama, starring William Shatner and Heather Locklear

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: The dedicated police officer faces a conflict of interests while tracking a gang of thieves who successfully emptied the contents of an armoured car. Can he bring them to justice without compromising his efforts to help the sister of one of the suspects? Drama, starring William Shatner

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: An ex-colleague of Hooker becomes obsessed with avenging his daughters rape. Police drama, starring William Shatner, with a guest appearance by fellow Star Trek veteran Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: Blood River (1991)
programme.desc: A drifter guns down the man who murdered his parents then flees for his life, fearing the dead mans powerful father will seek revenge. He receives shelter from a mysterious old man, but starts to realise his saviour may not have his best interests in mind. Western, starring Rick Schroder, Wilford Brimley and Adrienne Barbeau

programme.title: Boot Hill (1969)
programme.desc: A greedy and corrupt businessman rules over a prospecting town, claiming ownership over the gold-rich land and using violence to keep the locals in line. Help comes from an unlikely source when two gunslingers join forces with a travelling circus to free the townsfolk from his control. Comedy Western, starring Terence Hill and Bud Spencer, with Woody Strode and Victor Buono

programme.title: The Last Command (1955)
programme.desc: Adventurer Jim Bowie returns to Texas during the 1830s and tries to quell the simmering antagonism between settlers and the Mexican government. However, as the Mexican armys aggression intensifies, he is forced to take up arms and fight in the historic battle at the Alamo. Western, starring Sterling Hayden, Arthur Hunnicutt, Anna Maria Alberghetti and Richard Carlson

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man who enjoys loud noises suddenly suffers pain on hearing the slightest of sounds

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A ventriloquists dummy leads its jaded master into a life of crime

programme.title: The Presidio (1988)
programme.desc: A military policeman-turned-cop reluctantly teams up with his old commanding officer to investigate a murder at a San Francisco army base - and uncovers a deadly conspiracy in the process. Action thriller, starring Sean Connery, Mark Harmon and Meg Ryan

programme.title: Carlitos Way (1993)
programme.desc: A former gangster is released from jail and vows to go straight, hoping to earn enough money to escape his New York roots - but his misguided loyalty to a crooked lawyer threatens to drag him back into a life of crime. Brian De Palmas thriller, starring Al Pacino, Sean Penn, Penelope Ann Miller, John Leguizamo and Viggo Mortensen

programme.title: Assassin (2014)
programme.desc: A hitman is hired by two notorious gangster brothers to murder a politician. He falls for a woman during the assignment, but does not realise she is his victims daughter. Her investigation of her fathers death threatens to cause a gang war and puts the assassin at odds with his employers. Crime thriller, starring Danny Dyer, Gary and Martin Kemp

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Church (2014)
programme.desc: A travelling Texas preacher puts plans to build his own church on hold to rescue his estranged son who is accused of robbery and murder. Western, starring Tom Berenger

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Hertfordshire, the heli-medics help a man who is fighting for his life following a cardiac arrest. A tumble on an obstacle course leaves fun-runner Vijitha with a painful open fracture. Plus, in Northumberland, seven-year-old Imogen suffers an impalement at the bike track

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The AandE documentary series turns its attention to caring and kindness at St Georges Hospital in south-west London, highlighting altruistic acts from staff, patients and visitors alike. A 13-year-old cyclist experiencing bouts of unconsciousness is sent for a CT scan, and 84-year-old Ursula, who was born in Germany, arrives in resus having lost a lot of blood during a series of severe nose-bleeds. Plus, 76-year-old Margaret is brought in to St Georges after suffering a suspected stroke during a routine appointment at another hospital, and the doctors must quickly administer a clot-busting drug if they are to prevent further damage to her brain

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Co Durham, heli-medics battle to keep Mick alive after he has a seizure. A fun day takes a turn at the motocross track that leaves 12-year-old Ollie with a limb-threatening injury. And in the Yorkshire Dales, theres a dramatic hillside rescue for seriously-injured paraglider Alastair

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Cora, 62, arrives by air ambulance following a high-speed road accident, which left her trapped in the car for more than an hour. Her husband Rae, 65, who was driving, is brought in soon after, and staff are concerned he may have sustained serious head, neck and internal injuries. Scott, 23, has badly cut his knee after a night out, and while hes being treated, he reflects on his schizophrenia diagnosis as a teenager. Retired carpenter Richard, 68, has fallen and hit his head on the pavement, but medics also want to look into his unusually low blood pressure

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty investigates shock reports that changing sea temperatures mean squid and chips could one day replace fish and chips as the UKs national dish, and heads to Thailand, where squid is a national obsession. Kate Quilton goes Down Under to find out about a surprising new meat coming into our supermarkets and Matt Tebbutt heads to Italy to find out how supermarkets can sell pesto at an affordable price when the traditional ingredients are famously expensive

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners of the Sea Verge Hotel in Paignton, Devon, try to prove their BandB offers the best value for money. However, Tony and Chris Fulbrooks guests are far from happy, with Christine Hale complaining about the noise from the sea and scolding Chris for serving breakfast in her slippers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves on to the Portcullis Hotel in Chipping Sodbury, Gloucestershire, where mother-and-daughter owners Christine and Jenna Hale make a poor first impression by cajoling their guests into taking part in a karaoke session that runs until 2am. Matters worsen the following day, as a caricaturing workshop does little to alleviate the tension among the contestants

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Entrepreneur Andy Scott hosts at the Orchid Hotel in Bournemouth, and takes on Richard Bailey in the boxing gym. Christine and Jenna Hale are unhappy to find foreign objects in their beds, and a spot of flirting is brought to a swift halt when the owner receives some negative feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to Orles Barn in Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, where owners Richard and Kelly Bailey impress their guests with the beauty and quality of the accommodation. The contestants then head to a local organic supplier to pick asparagus for their dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the weeks competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman heads to the Canary Islands to help retired architect Nick and former journalist Tim find their dream holiday home from home on Gran Canaria. Theyve been together for 10 years and love living by the sea on the Cornish coastline. Now, they hope to find a holiday bolthole that will be their perfect escape from the chilly British winters. With a budget of £250,000, Jasmine hopes to deliver their dream with any of the five properties she locates

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps Lindsay and Ian find their dream holiday home in Almeria, Spain on a budget of £60,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps engaged couple Louise and Chris find their perfect holiday home in Manilva, Spain on a budget of £120,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lee Juggurnauth jets off to Torrevieja on Spains Costa Blanca to help ex-engineer Ash and retired banker Anila find their dream holiday home. With a budget of £135,000, they want a three-bedroom property with a swimming pool that the children and grandchildren can all enjoy

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dog-mad executive PA Julie-Ann Rayner hosts the first dinner party in Southend-on-Sea, Essex, and hopes to impress her guests - science teacher Damian Loneragan, DJ Scott Langley, barmaid Steph Barrett and glamorous granny Carol Dolman - with a taste of the sea menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Carol Dolman hosts the second dinner party in Southend-on-Sea, Essex. The glamorous grandmother hopes her scallops and roast lamb, dress to impress theme and tango lessons given by local instructors are enough to win her the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Teacher Damian Loneragan hosts the third dinner party in Southend-on-Sea, Essex, where he hopes his chilli-based dishes, and a lemon and ginger dessert, will help him win the £1,000 prize. However, after a disastrous main course, he goes all-out to wow his guests with science experiments in the garden

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Barmaid Steph Barrett is the fourth host of this weeks competition in Southend-on-Sea, Essex, and sets a 1940s dress code. The day gets off to a tricky start when she attempts to make home-made pastry for the first time, but her nan saves the day. The guests are suitably impressed by her home, and the dancing entertainment goes down even better than the food

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: DJ Scott Langley hosts the final party in Southend-on-Sea, Essex, and decides to take a gamble by serving fried pigeon as his main course. He insists on an outrageous dress code for the evening, and unveils some special entertainment before the weeks winner is announced

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at the Buck Inn in Malham, North Yorkshire, where mother-and-daughter team Karen and Kathryn Souter hope their BandB will impress their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves to Smithson Farm in Reedley Hallows, Lancashire, where Carole and Harry Johnson hope their glampsite gives their guests a taste of the great outdoors

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Mallard House in Gilling West, North Yorkshire, where manager Olivia Skeoch and head of housekeeping Teresa Weedon hope their guests will lap up the luxury

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to Dick and Liz Bradleys BandB, Bryn Derwen in Rhayader, Powys, where its all about the home-from-home experience. Harry and Carole appear to have found the perfect match but for Kathryn, the decor is disappointing. At dinner, the BandBers reflect on the week and talk about keeping in touch, but theres an uncomfortable silence from one end of the table

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the last time and things get personal when Olivia and Teresa of Mallard House take Harry and Carole to task over their feedback. After dramatic discoveries and cutting comments, the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Junior doctor Simon is concerned 40-year-old doorman Alfred, who was stabbed multiple times outside the social club where he works, may have internal injuries. Eighteen-year-old student George is brought into resus with blood coming from his ear and behaving erratically, following a fight at a party, and is sent for an urgent scan when consultant Phil becomes worried he may have a life-threatening bleed on his brain

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The emergency room documentary continues, highlighting the stories of people facing adversity head-on. Erin, a 61-year-old former cancer patient with an ear infection, is rushed to St Georges Hospital after she collapsed at home. Doctors fear the condition may have spread to her brain, and send her for a CT scan to find out more. Tony, a 70-year-old part-time DJ, arrives in AandE after being involved in a high-speed bicycle accident while training for a 100-mile charity bike ride, and Charlie, a 39-year-old cabin crew worker, turns up at the hospital complaining of unbearable pain after discharging himself during a previous visit, and removing the cast fitted to support his broken arm

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The 100th episode of the series focuses on the love between patients and their nearest and dearest. Sir John Cockburn, whos 89, arrives at St Georges with acute abdominal pain and medics think it could be an abdominal aortic aneurysm and he faces emergency surgery. Meanwhile, 68-year-old Mick and his wife Linda have been involved in a head-on car crash. Mick took the brunt of the impact and has multiple injuries from top to toe that could be life-changing. The couple fell in love after leaving previous relationships, making a happy life together in their mobile home. And 10-year-old Niall is brought to AandE after falling 8ft from a tree on a family picnic. Hes broken his arm so badly it looks like a banana, and orthopaedic doctors need to work out how to get it back in place

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The heli-medics race to assist Linda, who has suffered a heart attack on a Norfolk beach. Motocross rider Alex is in a bad way after being hit by another bike. Meanwhile, in Cumbria, 15-year-old cyclist Dan is treated for a possible skull fracture after colliding with a car on a country road

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Junior doctor Simon is concerned 40-year-old doorman Alfred, who was stabbed multiple times outside the social club where he works, may have internal injuries. Eighteen-year-old student George is brought into resus with blood coming from his ear and behaving erratically, following a fight at a party, and is sent for an urgent scan when consultant Phil becomes worried he may have a life-threatening bleed on his brain

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The emergency room documentary continues, highlighting the stories of people facing adversity head-on. Erin, a 61-year-old former cancer patient with an ear infection, is rushed to St Georges Hospital after she collapsed at home. Doctors fear the condition may have spread to her brain, and send her for a CT scan to find out more. Tony, a 70-year-old part-time DJ, arrives in AandE after being involved in a high-speed bicycle accident while training for a 100-mile charity bike ride, and Charlie, a 39-year-old cabin crew worker, turns up at the hospital complaining of unbearable pain after discharging himself during a previous visit, and removing the cast fitted to support his broken arm

programme.title: Supermarkets Unwrapped
programme.desc: The team head for the Vegan Aisle for all the news on animal-free food. Helen Lawal visits Tesco to find out how they keep up with all the plant-based burger trend, John Whaite seeks out the secret to the snap in a vegan sausage skin, Kate Quilton finds out how exactly you milk an oat, and Briony May Williams learns how to make a quiche without egg

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: National Heritage worker Gillian Sutherland hosts the first dinner party in Inverness, and has high hopes that her guests - emergency-call handler Melissa Kirby, property tycoon David Edes, hair stylist Zarina Ainslie and personal fitness trainer Jamie Tulloch - will appreciate her traditional Scottish menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Designer-label fan Melissa Kirby hosts the second dinner party in Inverness, hoping her cooking lessons from one of the citys best chefs will win her the £1,000 prize. However, rival Gillian is unimpressed when she finds out the chef also made the gravy

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Property tycoon and teetotaller David Edes hosts a nautical evening for the third dinner party in Inverness, where his menu of basic but wholesome food makes his guests wary. A night of suspicion and hilarity between the diners ensues

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the fourth night of the contest in Inverness, it is hairdresser Zarina Ainslies turn to host. The fun-loving hopeful needs to live up to her lofty claims of being an amazing cook as her fellow contestants prepare to rate her on the evening

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Former professional footballer Jamie Tulloch hosts the final party in Inverness, going to the trouble of ensuring all the ingredients in his chosen dishes are locally sourced. However, it remains to be seen whether his home-grown approach to fine dining will be enough to impress his discerning fellow competitors, and as the night draws to a close, the weeks winner is revealed

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Diane and Gary are looking for an accessible holiday home with a pool in the all-year-round sunshine of Paphos on Cyprus. With three adult children and the recent arrival of their first grandchild, the couple cant wait to have all the family to stay, creating many years of happy memories together. Laura Hamilton sets out to find a property that keeps everyone happy on their budget of £130,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Gordon and Staci are singers from Glasgow, and it was their mutual love of music that brought them together 22 years ago. Now, with their children all grown up, theyre hoping to escape their hectic schedules back home and find their perfect holiday home in western Tenerife. With a budget of £170,000, can Lee Juggurnauth deliver their dream with any of the five fantastic properties hes found?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jean Johansson helps Ryan and Steve who want to buy a holiday home on the island of Gran Canaria. Their favourite resort is Maspalomas with its great beaches, shopping and nightlife. For their budget of £150,000, Jean shows them five properties to coinsider

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Retired GP surgery manager Suzie is looking for a holiday home for her and her husband Ram, on Spains Costa del Sol. Shes brings along her son Rishi to help her with the search. Laura Hamilton helps out, assessing what she can acquire with her £250,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Craig Rowe meets teacher Kirsty from Co Armagh, who is looking for a holiday home on the Canary Island of Lanzarote, showing her five properties within her budget of £120,000

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Heather and Tim from Lothianburn enlist the help of the hosts to see if they can improve the seven-acre property they live in or if they should start afresh somewhere else. With Tim hating the dysfunctional layout, lack of storage and inadequate space for working from home, Phil Spencer looks for a new place that ticks all the boxes. Heather however loves their home and isnt ready to leave considering the work and money theyve put into making it theirs. She asks Kirstie Allsopp for help renovating, certain she can bring back the joy the couple once felt there

programme.title: George Clarkes Remarkable Renovations
programme.desc: Marcus and Kathryn have lived in the same house for nearly 20 years and raised their three children there, but Marcus has always dreamt of renovating his parents railway goods shed. When developers bought the land surrounding the building from his parents, he knew it was now or never

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Blackfriars in Inverness. After an afternoon of crafting, two guests note that quality is lacking in their room, leading to some very strong words

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Singer Marilyn and her mum Agnes host the second visit of the week at Bogenraith House in Aberdeenshire where theyre hoping to hit the high notes, but Dean and Chelsie are in an unforgiving mood after their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Pamela hosts the third visit of the week at Cairngorms Glamping in Aberdeenshire where most of her guests are tickled pink by the pods but one pair arent happy campers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the Lovat Hotel in Perth. Sharmin and Sarah are used to tackling big jobs at their expansive 35-room hostelry, but one of their guests finds fault with the facilities. Tension between the BandBers mounts during a visit to a museum, and the breakfast set-up confuses everyone and leaves Sharmin and Sarah with some difficult-to-swallow scores in their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Its a feisty old payment day after a week packed to the gills with gripes. The tension is almost tangible as the scores are revealed and the winner announced

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: Dr Jonathan fears that a father-of-two who fell off a ladder and smashed his leg through a window could lose his foot. Dr Sarah mentors emergency registrar Dr Daniel through the challenging case of a motorcyclist who crashed over the handlebars of his bike. Doctors Elyssia and Alex examine a 51-year-old woman who attempted a backflip on a trampoline but landed on her head

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The documentary detailing the daily work of staff at St Georges Hospital in south-west London continues, this time highlighting the stories of patients who received support from loved ones when life became tough. Gerald, a 66-year-old lifeguard and polo club official is rushed into AandE, having sustained a serious head wound after a 10-foot fall. The friends and family of 55-year-old Beverly gather at the hospital when she is admitted with a broken leg after being hit by a car near her home, and Paul, a 39-year-old father-of-three, arrives in resus with a nasty cut to his right arm. Paul complains that he is unable to move his fingers, leading staff to believe be may have significant tendon or nerve damage that could leave him permanently unable to use his hand

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Surgeons must plan their next move carefully when Daisy, a 22-month-old girl, arrives at St Georges Hospital by air ambulance after being kicked in the head by a horse at her familys stables. Meanwhile, 54-year-old Mike, who has a form of medication-resistant epilepsy, arrives in minors with a bandage around his jaw after falling face-first onto the pavement. Plus, 100-year-old Florence, who was diagnosed with dementia three years earlier, and her daughter Frances arrive at the hospital when the former suffers what appears to be a stroke

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: Dr Jonathan fears that a father-of-two who fell off a ladder and smashed his leg through a window could lose his foot. Dr Sarah mentors emergency registrar Dr Daniel through the challenging case of a motorcyclist who crashed over the handlebars of his bike. Doctors Elyssia and Alex examine a 51-year-old woman who attempted a backflip on a trampoline but landed on her head

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The documentary detailing the daily work of staff at St Georges Hospital in south-west London continues, this time highlighting the stories of patients who received support from loved ones when life became tough. Gerald, a 66-year-old lifeguard and polo club official is rushed into AandE, having sustained a serious head wound after a 10-foot fall. The friends and family of 55-year-old Beverly gather at the hospital when she is admitted with a broken leg after being hit by a car near her home, and Paul, a 39-year-old father-of-three, arrives in resus with a nasty cut to his right arm. Paul complains that he is unable to move his fingers, leading staff to believe be may have significant tendon or nerve damage that could leave him permanently unable to use his hand

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The 100th episode of the series focuses on the love between patients and their nearest and dearest. Sir John Cockburn, whos 89, arrives at St Georges with acute abdominal pain and medics think it could be an abdominal aortic aneurysm and he faces emergency surgery. Meanwhile, 68-year-old Mick and his wife Linda have been involved in a head-on car crash. Mick took the brunt of the impact and has multiple injuries from top to toe that could be life-changing. The couple fell in love after leaving previous relationships, making a happy life together in their mobile home. And 10-year-old Niall is brought to AandE after falling 8ft from a tree on a family picnic. Hes broken his arm so badly it looks like a banana, and orthopaedic doctors need to work out how to get it back in place

programme.title: Supermarkets Unwrapped
programme.desc: The Food Unwrapped team take a deep dive into the nations favourite supermarket aisles. In this first episode, the team chill out in the freezer aisle. Jimmy Doherty investigates why theres more to frozen chips than just potatoes, Helen Lawal learns why frozen ready meals have best-before dates, Briony May Williams gets the inside scoop on soft-scoop ice cream, and Andi Oliver learns how to get the most out of your freezer at home

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The heli-medics race to assist Linda, who has suffered a heart attack on a Norfolk beach. Motocross rider Alex is in a bad way after being hit by another bike. Meanwhile, in Cumbria, 15-year-old cyclist Dan is treated for a possible skull fracture after colliding with a car on a country road

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Co Durham, heli-medics battle to keep Mick alive after he has a seizure. A fun day takes a turn at the motocross track that leaves 12-year-old Ollie with a limb-threatening injury. And in the Yorkshire Dales, theres a dramatic hillside rescue for seriously-injured paraglider Alastair

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Cora, 62, arrives by air ambulance following a high-speed road accident, which left her trapped in the car for more than an hour. Her husband Rae, 65, who was driving, is brought in soon after, and staff are concerned he may have sustained serious head, neck and internal injuries. Scott, 23, has badly cut his knee after a night out, and while hes being treated, he reflects on his schizophrenia diagnosis as a teenager. Retired carpenter Richard, 68, has fallen and hit his head on the pavement, but medics also want to look into his unusually low blood pressure

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty investigates shock reports that changing sea temperatures mean squid and chips could one day replace fish and chips as the UKs national dish, and heads to Thailand, where squid is a national obsession. Kate Quilton goes Down Under to find out about a surprising new meat coming into our supermarkets and Matt Tebbutt heads to Italy to find out how supermarkets can sell pesto at an affordable price when the traditional ingredients are famously expensive

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners of the Sea Verge Hotel in Paignton, Devon, try to prove their BandB offers the best value for money. However, Tony and Chris Fulbrooks guests are far from happy, with Christine Hale complaining about the noise from the sea and scolding Chris for serving breakfast in her slippers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves on to the Portcullis Hotel in Chipping Sodbury, Gloucestershire, where mother-and-daughter owners Christine and Jenna Hale make a poor first impression by cajoling their guests into taking part in a karaoke session that runs until 2am. Matters worsen the following day, as a caricaturing workshop does little to alleviate the tension among the contestants

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Entrepreneur Andy Scott hosts at the Orchid Hotel in Bournemouth, and takes on Richard Bailey in the boxing gym. Christine and Jenna Hale are unhappy to find foreign objects in their beds, and a spot of flirting is brought to a swift halt when the owner receives some negative feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to Orles Barn in Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, where owners Richard and Kelly Bailey impress their guests with the beauty and quality of the accommodation. The contestants then head to a local organic supplier to pick asparagus for their dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the weeks competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman heads to the Canary Islands to help retired architect Nick and former journalist Tim find their dream holiday home from home on Gran Canaria. Theyve been together for 10 years and love living by the sea on the Cornish coastline. Now, they hope to find a holiday bolthole that will be their perfect escape from the chilly British winters. With a budget of £250,000, Jasmine hopes to deliver their dream with any of the five properties she locates

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps Lindsay and Ian find their dream holiday home in Almeria, Spain on a budget of £60,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps engaged couple Louise and Chris find their perfect holiday home in Manilva, Spain on a budget of £120,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lee Juggurnauth jets off to Torrevieja on Spains Costa Blanca to help ex-engineer Ash and retired banker Anila find their dream holiday home. With a budget of £135,000, they want a three-bedroom property with a swimming pool that the children and grandchildren can all enjoy

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dog-mad executive PA Julie-Ann Rayner hosts the first dinner party in Southend-on-Sea, Essex, and hopes to impress her guests - science teacher Damian Loneragan, DJ Scott Langley, barmaid Steph Barrett and glamorous granny Carol Dolman - with a taste of the sea menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Carol Dolman hosts the second dinner party in Southend-on-Sea, Essex. The glamorous grandmother hopes her scallops and roast lamb, dress to impress theme and tango lessons given by local instructors are enough to win her the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Teacher Damian Loneragan hosts the third dinner party in Southend-on-Sea, Essex, where he hopes his chilli-based dishes, and a lemon and ginger dessert, will help him win the £1,000 prize. However, after a disastrous main course, he goes all-out to wow his guests with science experiments in the garden

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Barmaid Steph Barrett is the fourth host of this weeks competition in Southend-on-Sea, Essex, and sets a 1940s dress code. The day gets off to a tricky start when she attempts to make home-made pastry for the first time, but her nan saves the day. The guests are suitably impressed by her home, and the dancing entertainment goes down even better than the food

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: DJ Scott Langley hosts the final party in Southend-on-Sea, Essex, and decides to take a gamble by serving fried pigeon as his main course. He insists on an outrageous dress code for the evening, and unveils some special entertainment before the weeks winner is announced

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at the Buck Inn in Malham, North Yorkshire, where mother-and-daughter team Karen and Kathryn Souter hope their BandB will impress their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves to Smithson Farm in Reedley Hallows, Lancashire, where Carole and Harry Johnson hope their glampsite gives their guests a taste of the great outdoors

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Mallard House in Gilling West, North Yorkshire, where manager Olivia Skeoch and head of housekeeping Teresa Weedon hope their guests will lap up the luxury

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to Dick and Liz Bradleys BandB, Bryn Derwen in Rhayader, Powys, where its all about the home-from-home experience. Harry and Carole appear to have found the perfect match but for Kathryn, the decor is disappointing. At dinner, the BandBers reflect on the week and talk about keeping in touch, but theres an uncomfortable silence from one end of the table

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the last time and things get personal when Olivia and Teresa of Mallard House take Harry and Carole to task over their feedback. After dramatic discoveries and cutting comments, the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.sub-title: Life at the Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Paul Murton returns to visit more islands off the coastline, beginning with the Outer Hebrides. He resumes his journey on Eriskay, where he discovers how the remote location helped preserve a unique way of life for centuries - and also allowed locals to hide thousands of bottles of whisky from the excise men when a ship laden with the thirst-quenching cargo ran aground in 1941. The story inspired the 1949 movie Whisky Galore! Moving on to Barra, Paul goes foraging for cockles and visits the only airport in the world where scheduled flights land on the beach, then heads across to Vatersay, where he joins local fishermen trawling for lobsters

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.desc: Paul Murton explores the Isle of Mull and its satellite islands to discover why they have become boltholes from the hustle and bustle of the modern world. He begins on the tidal island of Erraid, which inspired famous Scottish writer Robert Louis Stevenson, then hops over to Ulva, the final resting place of Lachlan MacQuarrie, one of the first governors of New South Wales. He then explores Mull itself, being given a whistlestop tour of the island by rally driver Louise Thomas, then travels to the mysterious little island of Inch Kenneth, where he hears the story of Nazi sympathizer Unity Mitford. He ends his tour at the remote Treshnish Islands, where he experiences a spot of puffin therapy

programme.title: Lost Cities of Rome
programme.desc: Rome created the largest empire in the ancient world - its armies, organisation and building innovation created a vast territory linked by roads. Many of these cities lie in ruins today, others are buried and many others are forgotten. programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.desc: Paul Murton visits Gigha and Jura, two islands of the Inner Hebrides that are only a few miles apart but could not be more different. He begins at the Achamore Gardens on Gigha, which were created in the 1930s by the malted-drink millionaire James Horlick. He loved Gighas mild climate so much that he bought the island and made it his home. Today Gigha is owned by the community, and many of its residents are incomers attracted by the opportunity to begin a new island life on this small and fertile place. Where Gigha is small, lush and verdant, Jura is rugged and awe-inspiring. Despite being one of Scotlands largest islands, just 200 people live there - alongside more than 5,000 deer

programme.desc: Documentary examining stories of brutal acts of violence in the aftermath of the Second World War. programme.title: Cheating Hitler: Surviving the Holocaust
programme.desc: Three Canadian Holocaust survivors journey to home towns, killing sites, archives and hiding places in search of clues to unanswered questions from their pasts. Maxwell wonders what happened to a baby he saved in a forest in 1943, Helen wants to know more about the fate of her brother, while Rose is retracing the final steps of the woman who saved her life. The survivors came of age during the Holocaust and carry the burden of knowing they are the last living link to it

programme.desc: Republic of Ireland v Poland (Kick-off 3.00pm). All the action from the fourth Group A2 match for both teams, held at Aviva Stadium. This is the second meeting between the teams in quick succession after they faced each other in Gdansk on Tuesday, and the Republic will be looking to make home advantage count as they look to get points on the board in a difficult group also containing France and the Netherlands. Marie Crowe presents, with analysis from Karen Duggan and Stephanie Zambra, and commentary by Des Curran and Rianna Jarrett

programme.desc: In Kinghorn, on Scotlands east coast, a simple call out for the RNLI crew to a paddleboarder in difficulty isnt all that it seems. With analysis from Donal Óg Cusack, Joe Canning and Liam Sheedy

programme.title: Dr No (1962)
programme.desc: James Bond travels to the Caribbean to investigate when a fellow agent is murdered by a trio of mysterious blind assassins. Uncovering evidence of a powerful nuclear-powered weapon being used in Jamaica, Bond joins forces with a CIA operative, a local boat captain and a mysterious beachcomber as he battles a criminal genius with a plan to destroy the US space program. The first in the long-running spy thriller series based on Ian Flemings novels, starring Sean Connery, Ursula Andress, Jack Lord, Joseph Wiseman, John Kitzmiller and Bernard Lee

programme.title: Kingdom
programme.desc: Lioness Rita is raising the next generation, but caring for her cubs alone leaves them vulnerable while she hunts. The hyenas strength is growing, but a flooded den spells disaster and the clan become separated. Seeking a mate, leopard Olimba begins a new chapter, but in her way is her daughter - she has now become her main rival, and only one can remain

programme.title: The Sunday Game

When Pauls old boat turns up in Sues garage, he decides to take the family out on the water, hoping it might cheer Amy up a bit. Meanwhile, Rachel is keen to convince her new classmates that, despite being literally twice their age, shes one of them. programme.title: Buddy Holly: Rave On
programme.desc: Rock n roll started with Elvis, but some believe that pop music started with Buddy Holly and the Crickets. As a songwriter, Holly revolutionised the genre by introducing dynamic new rhythms and unpredictable melodies beyond its traditional blues roots. In his songs written and recorded in the late 50s, it is already possible to hear the beat group sound of the 1960s, and beyond. This documentary tells the story of Hollys tragically short life and career through interviews with those who knew him and worked with him. Contributors include Don McLean, Paul Anka, Don Everly, Hank Marvin and Bob Harris

He goes behind the scenes at Newcastle United with local football hero Peter Beardsley, learns about the history of adult comic Viz from former editor Simon Donald and accompanies comedienne Sarah Millican to her favourite part of the city

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: The death of a member of the Axe Capital family forces both Axe and Wendy to do some soul searching, while also creating a setback for Chuck. Drama, starring Damian Lewis

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Axe loses hundreds of millions of dollars on a bad trade and turns to Wendy for help. Meanwhile, Chuck looks to secure some powerful allies. Drama, starring Paul Giamatti

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: The people of the town begin to latch on to what Miles and Flora are up to, and decide its time for someone to put a stop to their games. Meanwhile, a vaccine arrives which is to be administered for smallpox

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: The inhabitants of the crime-riddled town call for a despotic government to rule over the commune and so Farnum is installed as mayor, with Utter as Fire Commissioner. Starring William Sanderson and Dayton Callie

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: A Chinese immigrant comes to town and, with the help of some pioneering translation techniques, manages to inform Swearengen that his shipment of opium has been stolen by two addicts

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.sub-title: Jewels Boot Is Made for Walking
programme.desc: Jewel continues to come under fire for the problems with her leg, so she visits Doc Cochran bearing pictures of braces, which she hopes will ease her discomfort. Meanwhile, Trixie has an appointment with Sol, and Almas father comes to town

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Seth Bullock puts self-doubt aside and appoints himself sheriff of Deadwood. Meanwhile, three men meet a grisly end with the deaths of the Rev Smith, Claggett and Otis Russell, the latter coming at the hands of the towns new law enforcer

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: While Alicent enlists help to track down Aegon, members of the Great Houses of Westeros are asked to affirm their allegiance

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: While mourning a tragic loss, Rhaenyra tries desperately to hold the realm together and Daemon prepares for war. Starring Matt Smith and Emma DArcy

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As Rhaenyra struggles to come to terms with her sons murder, Alicent grows concerned by Aegons Small Council. Return of the fantasy drama set 200 years before the events of Game of Thrones and telling the story of House Targaryen. Starring Matt Smith and Emma DArcy

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra questions Daemons loyalty as Otto schemes to turn the public against her, while Ser Criston Cole concocts a misguided plan for revenge

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As ancient grudges resurface, Rhaenys suggests that Alicent may see reason while the men around her seek bloodshed. Ser Criston proposes a bold scheme, while Daemon arrives at Harrenhal to raise an army for the Blacks

programme.title: The Miniature Wife
programme.desc: Lindy adjusts to life by exploring Lulus dolls house, while Les works to find a way to make her big again, but neither are prepared to face their biggest obstacle of corporate red tape. Romantic sci-fi comedy drama, starring Elizabeth Banks and Matthew Macfadyen

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: In the aftermath of mistaken and unflattering news reports that she passed away, Deborah returns to Las Vegas with Ava more determined than ever to secure her legacy as a comedian. Return of the comedy drama, starring Jean Smart and Hannah Einbinder

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: Comedy drama, starring Jean Smart as Las Vegas comedian Deborah Vance and Hannah Einbinder as her smart young writer Ava

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: While Hank leads the search for Clark, Prior asks Danvers about the murder-suicide case that drove a wedge between her and Navarro. After sifting through the contents of Clarks trailer, Navarro and Danvers seek out a local hairdresser for insight on Annie, which leads to a tip about another former Tsalal worker. Later, tensions grow between Danvers and her stepdaughter Leah

programme.title: The Trip to Italy (2014)
programme.desc: Sequel to improvised comedy The Trip, with Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon once again playing versions of themselves. The two comedy actors are asked to embark on another round of restaurant reviews for a Sunday newspaper, this time in Italy. Steve is on hiatus from his American TV series and isnt drinking while Rob is looking to unwind with his time away from his young family

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: A youth admits to murdering a woman killed during a botched hold-up, but Howard is convinced his confession does not hold water. Gritty police drama, starring Daniel Baldwin, Ned Beatty and Richard Belzer

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Pembleton investigates a murder, but the case proves to have broader ramifications and it is not long before he finds himself looking into allegations of police brutality. American police drama, starring Andre Braugher, Daniel Baldwin and Ned Beatty

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Tempers flare and tension rises between Pembleton and Gee as they investigate a contentious case involving allegations of police brutality

programme.title: Sort Of
programme.desc: Following a series of uncharacteristic messages, Sabi and Aqsa head home to check in on their mum, prompting Sabi to bare their truth

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Everyday life at Northumberlands Chillingham Castle, where the members of staff try to tactfully deal with the whims of their employer, baronet Humphry Wakefield, as the estate prepares to welcome a band of ghost-hunting tourists. Meanwhile, Carlton Towers in East Yorkshire hosts an annual dog show for Afghan hounds

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming heads across the Irish Sea to Dublin, where he succumbs to the citys famous charm and meets some of its most fascinating characters. On a journey that takes in an 18th-century pleasure house and a burlesque life-painting class, Alan also stops off in Temple Bar for a pint with singer Sharon Corr, unlocks a mystery in Irelands oldest library and uncovers a stylish secret that lurks behind the steel shutters of an old lock-up

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming visits Glasgow, one of his favourite cities, to reveal unusual and often hidden sights and sounds overlooked by the public. Starting at the Necropolis, he travels to the worlds oldest music hall before enjoying the views from a city-centre landmark. He also finds the time to take tea with a film star

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Axe discovers Chuck has new evidence against him that could land him in prison as the pair meet for an explosive confrontation. Drama, starring Damian Lewis

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Drama, starring Paul Giamatti and Damian Lewis. In the aftermath of their previous confrontation, Chuck faces increased scrutiny from his office, while Axe weighs his options for retaliation

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.sub-title: A Lie Agreed Upon - Part One
programme.desc: Seth Bullock takes his place as the new town sheriff and is soon indulging his growing desire for Alma Garret, even as his wife and stepson are due to arrive. Meanwhile, Al, the local purveyor of drink, drugs and women, grows increasingly bad-tempered and looks set to cause trouble. Drama set in a lawless US town starring Timothy Olyphant, Molly Parker and Ian McShane

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.sub-title: A Lie Agreed Upon - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Swearengen goads a preoccupied Bullock into an almighty brawl that could prove to be the final confrontation between the fiery pair, but neither of them can anticipate the return of Calamity Jane, who arrives on the scene with a vengeful agenda

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: A prospector arrives in town with a blueprint for a significant mining operation. Swearengens ailing health brings cause for concern, although he refuses all offers of medical attention. Meanwhile, Farnum finds a buyer for the Hickok letter

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Things look bleak for a seriously ill Swearengen as Doc Cochran informs him that surgery is his only option, while Bullock makes an attempt at domesticity and rumours begin to spread about the camps future. Starring Ian McShane, Timothy Olyphant and Brad Dourif

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Swearengen wakes up to fresh trouble in the town when a county commissioner delivers news that puts everyones gold claims in jeopardy, and Alma pays Trixie a visit when she finds herself in a different kind of trouble. Ian McShane and Molly Parker star

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.sub-title: The Red Dragon and the Gold
programme.desc: In Rhaenyras absence and with no word from Daemon at Harrenhal, Rhaenys tries to keep the peace on the Black Council as Cole mounts a campaign into the Crownlands. In Kings Landing, Aemond continues to undermine Aegons fragile hold on authority. Fantasy drama, starring Matt Smith and Emma DArcy

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Amid whispers of bad omens, the Greens consider how to fill a void on Aegons council, while Jacaerys sets out on a rogue mission to strike a deal. Daemon enlists Lord Willem Blackwood to help persuade the Brackens to bend the knee

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: With few options left, Rhaenyra summons a trusted knight for a risky venture and plots with Mysaria to catalyse the smallfolk. Meanwhile, Daemons unease grows, and Aemond takes steps to reshape the Green Council

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As Rhaenyra looks to gain an advantage by unusual means, Daemon puts pressure on Oscar Tully to raise up his bannermen

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As Aemond becomes more volatile, Larys plots an escape and Rhaenyra looks to press home her advantage. Fantasy drama, starring Matt Smith and Emma DArcy

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: Carries obsession with Milo takes a dark turn as she plans his kidnapping, forcing her to ask for help when things go awry, with deadly consequences.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A few years after high school, Rues debts finally catch up with her. Cassie hopes to finance her dream wedding by becoming internet famous, to the disapproval of Nate, who is also juggling the demands of running Cals business

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.sub-title: No Ones Normal. It Just Looks That Way from Across the Street
programme.desc: With Tiger Tiger out of the picture, Clark proposes a new plan, while Plumb and Homer are forced to question everything they thought they knew about the case after a series of revelations

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.sub-title: When Youre Lost in the Darkness
programme.desc: Twenty years after modern civilisation has been destroyed, a hardened survivor is hired to smuggle a 14-year-old girl out of an oppressive quarantine zone. What starts as a small job soon becomes a brutal, heartbreaking journey, as they both must traverse the US and depend on each other for survival. Starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Drama offering a look at the complexities of life in a social-media obsessed world, starring Zendaya

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Bayliss and Pembleton are called in to investigate the facts surrounding the death of a phone-sex operator. Gritty police drama, starring Andre Braugher, Daniel Baldwin and Richard Belzer

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: The team investigates the baffling death of a good Samaritan found wearing nothing but a pair of white gloves. Police drama, starring Daniel Baldwin, Ned Beatty and Richard Belzer

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: The Penningtons, owners of Muncaster Castle in the Lake District, discuss the challenges of housing three generations of their family under one roof, while elderly patriarch Patrick struggles to find new purpose following the death of his wife. At Maunsel House in Somerset, Sir Benjamin Slades preconceptions are challenged when a gay mens choir arrives for a weekend break

programme.title: Back to the Future (1985)
programme.desc: Teenager Marty McFly travels back to the 1950s in a time machine built by his eccentric inventor friend. The return journey proves tricky enough, but he also accidentally alters the sequence of events that led to his parents falling in love - and has to persuade his future dad to win his mothers heart, or he will never be born. Sci-fi comedy adventure, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Lea Thompson and Crispin Glover

programme.title: Black Dog (2024)
programme.desc: As part of a patrol tasked with clearing stray dogs before the 2008 Olympics, former stunt motorcyclist Lang bonds with a hound. Drama, starring Eddie Peng and Tong Liya. In Chinese with English subtitles

programme.title: Eye in the Sky (2015)
programme.desc: Colonel Katherine Powells mission to wipe out a terrorist cell in Kenya is complicated when a girl enters the blast radius of the intended drone strike. Powell has to decide between sacrificing the girls life or letting the terrorists flee to carry out more atrocities. Thriller, starring Helen Mirren, Alan Rickman and Aaron Paul

programme.title: Teen Titans Go! To The Movies (2018)
programme.desc: Five teenage superheroes, miffed by the fact they arent deemed worthy enough for their own big screen films, set out to prove themselves by tackling the villainous Slade and his maniacal plan for world domination. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton, Will Arnett and Nicolas Cage

programme.title: Wallace and Gromit in The Curse of the Were-Rabbit (2005)
programme.desc: Inventor Wallace and his canine sidekick Gromit have set up a pest-control service, and are called in to stop rabbits overrunning a garden show. However, the pair are overwhelmed when a destructive giant bunny arrives on the scene, while an interfering aristocrat contrives to make matters worse. Nick Parks Oscar-winning animated adventure, with the voices of Peter Sallis, Ralph Fiennes and Helena Bonham Carter

programme.title: Back to the Future (1985)
programme.desc: Teenager Marty McFly travels back to the 1950s in a time machine built by his eccentric inventor friend. The return journey proves tricky enough, but he also accidentally alters the sequence of events that led to his parents falling in love - and has to persuade his future dad to win his mothers heart, or he will never be born. Sci-fi comedy adventure, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Lea Thompson and Crispin Glover

programme.title: Spider-Man (2002)
programme.desc: A clumsy teenager develops superhuman powers after a genetically engineered spider bites him. At first his fantastic skills delight him, but his elation is severely tempered by a family tragedy, prompting him to dedicate his talents to combating evil. However, he faces a baptism of fire in the form of crazed villain the Green Goblin. Comic-book superhero adventure, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, Willem Dafoe, James Franco and Rosemary Harris

programme.title: Spider-Man 2 (2004)
programme.desc: Peter Parker continues his fight for justice, but unrequited love and personal worries take their toll and he is tempted to abandon his web-slinging alter ego. However, the arrival of deadly new bad guy Doctor Octopus plunges him into a race against time to save New York. Comic-book adventure sequel, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, Alfred Molina, James Franco and Rosemary Harris

programme.title: Spider-Man 3 (2007)
programme.desc: A sinister alien parasite brings out the web-slinging heros darker side, filling him with thoughts of revenge on his uncles murderer, the shape-shifting Sandman. Meanwhile, he also has to contend with the challenge of his best friend following in his fathers villainous footsteps - and a jealous rival developing superpowers of his own. Superhero sequel, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst and James Franco

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming (2017)
programme.desc: Peter Parker balances life as an ordinary high school student with his superhero alter-ego Spider-Man, while waiting in vain to join his mentor Iron Man on a world-saving mission. Determined to prove he is ready for bigger challenges, he investigates a spree of crimes committed with advanced weapons - leading him into a battle with a ruthless winged enemy on the hunt for priceless technology. Superhero adventure, starring Tom Holland, Michael Keaton and Robert Downey Jr

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home (2021)
programme.desc: With the web-slingers identity now revealed to the world, Peter Parker asks Doctor Strange for magical help to undo the damage. However, a spell gone wrong unleashes dangerous foes from parallel universes on the world. Comic-book adventure sequel, starring Tom Holland, Zendaya and Benedict Cumberbatch, with Willem Dafoe, Jamie Foxx and Alfred Molina among the stars of past Spider-Man movies reprising their roles

programme.title: Jurassic Park (1993)
programme.desc: Scientists are given a sneak preview of a safari park inhabited by genetically engineered dinosaurs created by an eccentric tycoon. However, it all goes wrong when a greedy employee sabotages the security systems, allowing the prehistoric beasts to roam free and hunt the visitors. Steven Spielbergs action adventure, starring Sam Neill, Laura Dern, Jeff Goldblum, Richard Attenborough and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: Sharp Corner (2024)
programme.desc: Josh McCall is a family man who becomes obsessed with saving the lives of the car accident victims on the sharp corner in front of his house. Its an obsession that could cost him everything. Writer/director Jason Buxtons thriller, starring Ben Foster, Cobie Smulders and Gavin Drea

programme.title: The Dry (2020)
programme.desc: Federal agent Aaron Falk returns to his drought-stricken home town after an absence of more than 20 years to attend the funeral of his childhood friend. But his arrival opens up a decades-old wound - the unsolved death of a teenage girl. Crime drama, starring Eric Bana and Genevieve OReilly

programme.title: Wallace and Gromit in The Curse of the Were-Rabbit (2005)
programme.desc: Inventor Wallace and his canine sidekick Gromit have set up a pest-control service, and are called in to stop rabbits overrunning a garden show. However, the pair are overwhelmed when a destructive giant bunny arrives on the scene, while an interfering aristocrat contrives to make matters worse. Nick Parks Oscar-winning animated adventure, with the voices of Peter Sallis, Ralph Fiennes and Helena Bonham Carter

programme.title: Grow (2025)
programme.desc: Rivals pull every trick in the book to win a pumpkin-growing contest, but it remains to be seen whether farmer Dinah Little and her talented niece, Charlie, will come out on top. Comedy, starring Nick Frost, Golda Rosheuvel and Priya-Rose Brookwell

programme.title: Spy Kids (2001)
programme.desc: A megalomaniac threatens to take over the world, so two married spies come out of retirement to thwart his plans. However, when they go missing, it is up to their plucky children to step in and save the day. Family adventure directed by Robert Rodriguez, starring Antonio Banderas, Carla Gugino, Alan Cumming, Alexa Vega and Daryl Sabara

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming (2017)
programme.desc: Peter Parker balances life as an ordinary high school student with his superhero alter-ego Spider-Man, while waiting in vain to join his mentor Iron Man on a world-saving mission. Comic-book adventure sequel, starring Tom Holland, Zendaya and Benedict Cumberbatch, with Willem Dafoe, Jamie Foxx and Alfred Molina among the stars of past Spider-Man movies reprising their roles

programme.title: Jurassic Park (1993)

However, it all goes wrong when a greedy employee sabotages the security systems, allowing the prehistoric beasts to roam free and hunt the visitors. Steven Spielbergs action adventure, starring Sam Neill, Laura Dern, Jeff Goldblum, Richard Attenborough and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: Men in Black (1997)
programme.desc: A streetwise cop is enlisted by a top-secret government force dedicated to policing alien visitors to Earth, teaming up with a veteran agent just as a body-swapping extraterrestrial giant insect begins a reign of terror throughout New York City. Sci-fi comedy, starring Will Smith, Tommy Lee Jones, Linda Fiorentino, Rip Torn and Vincent DOnofrio

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum (2007)
programme.desc: Amnesiac rogue assassin Jason Bournes long-buried memories are reawakened by a British journalist researching the secret organisation that was responsible for transforming him into a killing machine. Meanwhile, a ruthless CIA director becomes convinced Bourne is still a security risk, and plans to dispose of him once and for all. Third instalment of the spy thriller series, directed by Paul Greengrass and starring Matt Damon, Joan Allen, Julia Stiles, David Strathairn, Paddy Considine, Scott Glenn and Albert Finney

programme.title: 10 Cloverfield Lane (2016)
programme.desc: A woman survives a car crash, and wakes up to find herself in an underground bunker, belonging to a survivalist who claims that a devastating attack has left the outside world uninhabitable. As his behaviour becomes increasingly stranger, she begins to fear she is being tricked and resolves to discover the truth for herself. Thriller, starring Mary Elizabeth Winstead and John Goodman

programme.title: The Dry (2020)
programme.desc: Federal agent Aaron Falk returns to his drought-stricken home town after an absence of more than 20 years to attend the funeral of his childhood friend. But his arrival opens up a decades-old wound - the unsolved death of a teenage girl. Crime drama, starring Eric Bana and Genevieve OReilly

programme.title: Nightcrawler (2014)
programme.desc: A cynical petty crook is inspired when he sees a freelance camera crew, and decides to go into business filming crime scenes and accidents, then selling the footage to news broadcasters. His determination to stay ahead of the competition leads him down a dark path as his methods become increasingly ruthless. Crime drama, starring Jake Gyllenhaal, Rene Russo and Bill Paxton

programme.title: Mass (2021)
programme.desc: Years after an unspeakable tragedy tore their lives apart, two sets of grieving parents agree to talk privately about what happened, in an attempt to move forward. First-time director Fran Kranz drama, starring Jason Isaacs, Martha Plimpton, Reed Birney and Ann Dowd

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - April 2026
programme.desc: Previews of the films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights

programme.title: Sketch (2025)
programme.desc: When a young girls sketchbook slips into a mysterious pond, her drawings burst into life. As her once-quiet town spirals into chaos, she and her divided family must come together to track down the creatures they never meant to unleash. Writer/director Seth Worleys fantasy comedy, starring Tony Hale and DArcy Carden

programme.title: One Battle After Another (2025)
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, he scrambles to find her as both battle the consequences of their pasts. Paul Thomas Andersons action thriller loosely based on Thomas Pynchons novel Vineland, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Sean Penn and Benicio del Toro

programme.title: Final Destination: Bloodlines (2025)
programme.desc: Fifty-five years after her grandparents are involved in a disaster involving a restaurant tower, college student Stefani Reyes is plagued by recurring nightmares of the incident, and returns home seeking answers. The sixth entry in the supernatural horror saga, starring Kaitlyn Santa Juana, Teo Briones and Richard Harmon

programme.title: Caught Stealing (2025)
programme.desc: Former baseball player Henry Hank Thompson foolishly agrees to cat-sit for British neighbour Russ, and walks unwittingly into the middle of a turf war between warring factions. Director Darren Aronofskys comedy thriller, starring Austin Butler, Zoe Kravitz and Matt Smith

programme.title: On Swift Horses (2025)
programme.desc: Mild-mannered war veteran Lee Walker plans a life of quiet domesticity in California with his wife Muriel and younger brother Julius. Restless after an early discharge from the US Army, Julius steals money from Lee to seek his fortune in Nevada, where he lands a job in security at a casino and sparks forbidden desire with co-worker Henry, which is consummated away from prying eyes. Back in their hotel room, Julius and Henry fantasise about using the same underhand tactics as card sharps to line their pockets. Drama, starring Daisy Edgar-Jones, Jacob Elordi and Will Poulter

programme.title: Blue Moon (2025)
programme.desc: Set over the course of one turbulent night in March 1943, Lorenz Hart, the waspish wordsmith responsible for The Lady Is a Tramp and My Funny Valentine, finds his life unravelling on the opening evening of his ex-partners show, Oklahoma! Director Richard Linklaters biographical comedy drama, starring Ethan Hawke, Margaret Qualley, Bobby Cannavale and Andrew Scott

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Struggling to adjust to their newly minted lives as Good Guys, the Bad Guys are offered one last job by a group of all-female criminals. Animated sequel, featuring the voices of Sam Rockwell, Marc Maron and Craig Robinson

programme.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey (2025)
programme.desc: New York bachelor David is due to drive to his friends wedding, but a wheel clamp on his vehicle derails those plans. He acquires a new drive from the mysterious Car Rental Company managed by two nameless agents, who are oddly familiar with his dating history. At the wedding, David meets fellow singleton Sarah and squanders an opportunity to dance with her. On the way home, the rental cars GPS asks him if he would like to embark on a big bold beautiful journey. When David agrees, the virtual assistant guides him to Sarah and they follow a winding route between physical doors that open into episodes from their respective pasts. Romantic drama, starring Colin Farrell and Margot Robbie

programme.title: Final Destination: Bloodlines (2025)
programme.desc: Fifty-five years after her grandparents are involved in a disaster involving a restaurant tower, college student Stefani Reyes is plagued by recurring nightmares of the incident, and returns home seeking answers. The sixth entry in the supernatural horror saga, starring Kaitlyn Santa Juana, Teo Briones and Richard Harmon

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: Roofman (2025)
programme.desc: Former US Army Reserve officer Jeffrey Manchester executes a plan to rob multiple branches of McDonalds. He is eventually captured by police and becomes the first person to escape from Brown Creek Correctional Institution in North Carolina. Jeffrey hides out at a toy shop for several months, and during forays outside the building, he sparks romance with store worker Leigh Wainscott. Comedy drama, starring Channing Tatum, Kirsten Dunst and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Pillion (2025)
programme.desc: A directionless man is swept off his feet when an enigmatic biker takes him on as his submissive. Director Harry Lightons Bafta-nominated comedy, starring Alexander Skarsgard, Harry Melling and Douglas Hodge

Writer/director Jim Owens comedy thriller, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Tanya Moodie and Nicholas Asbury

programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, he scrambles to find her as both battle the consequences of their pasts. Paul Thomas Andersons action thriller loosely based on Thomas Pynchons novel Vineland, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Sean Penn and Benicio del Toro

programme.title: Roofman (2025)
programme.desc: Former US Army Reserve officer Jeffrey Manchester executes a plan to rob multiple branches of McDonalds. He is eventually captured by police and becomes the first person to escape from Brown Creek Correctional Institution in North Carolina. Jeffrey hides out at a toy shop for several months, and during forays outside the building, he sparks romance with store worker Leigh Wainscott. Comedy drama, starring Channing Tatum, Kirsten Dunst and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey (2025)
programme.desc: New York bachelor David is due to drive to his friends wedding, but a wheel clamp on his vehicle derails those plans. He acquires a new drive from the mysterious Car Rental Company managed by two nameless agents, who are oddly familiar with his dating history. At the wedding, David meets fellow singleton Sarah and squanders an opportunity to dance with her. On the way home, the rental cars GPS asks him if he would like to embark on a big bold beautiful journey. When David agrees, the virtual assistant guides him to Sarah and they follow a winding route between physical doors that open into episodes from their respective pasts. Romantic drama, starring Colin Farrell and Margot Robbie

programme.title: Weapons (2025)
programme.desc: At 2.17am, 17 children from the class of Justine Gandy run into the night, arms outstretched, never to be seen again. The only child from the class who remains safely in their bed is Alex Lilly. Distraught parent Archer Graff joins other members of the local community in pointing a finger of blame at Ms Gandy for the shocking turn of events. While she pleads innocence, school principal Andrew Marcus seeks answers along with police officer Paul Morgan. Horror, starring Julia Garner, Josh Brolin and Alden Ehrenreich

programme.title: Pillion (2025)
programme.desc: A directionless man is swept off his feet when an enigmatic biker takes him on as his submissive. Director Harry Lightons Bafta-nominated comedy, starring Alexander Skarsgard, Harry Melling and Douglas Hodge

programme.title: Caught Stealing (2025)
programme.desc: Former baseball player Henry Hank Thompson foolishly agrees to cat-sit for British neighbour Russ, and walks unwittingly into the middle of a turf war between warring factions. Director Darren Aronofskys comedy thriller, starring Austin Butler, Zoe Kravitz and Matt Smith

programme.title: Blue Moon (2025)
programme.desc: Set over the course of one turbulent night in March 1943, Lorenz Hart, the waspish wordsmith responsible for The Lady Is a Tramp and My Funny Valentine, finds his life unravelling on the opening evening of his ex-partners show, Oklahoma! Director Richard Linklaters biographical comedy drama, starring Ethan Hawke, Margaret Qualley, Bobby Cannavale and Andrew Scott

programme.title: The Kid Stays in the Picture (2002)
programme.desc: Film producer Robert Evans narrates this documentary chronicling the ups and downs of his extraordinary life. Among the topics covered are his big break into the movie industry, his failed marriage to Ali McGraw, his relationships with Grace Kelly and Ava Gardner, his descent into drug addiction, and his journey back to respectability. With contributions by friends and family, and including footage of a host of Hollywood legends

programme.title: All That Breathes (2022)
programme.desc: Amidst the darkening backdrop of Delhis apocalyptic air and escalating violence, two brothers devote their lives to protect one casualty of the turbulent times - the bird known as the Black Kite. Documentary, starring Salik Rehman, Mohammad Saud and Nadeem Shehzad

programme.title: On the Line: The Richard Williams Story

programme.title: My Icon
programme.desc: British tennis star Heather Watson discusses the individuals who have inspired her over the course of her life

programme.title: Dogtown and Z-Boys
programme.desc: Documentary charting the history of skateboarding, from its 1970s emergence as a land-based form of surfing in Los Angeles and its subsequent explosion of popularity worldwide, to its current status as a widely-practised extreme sport. programme.title: My Icon
programme.desc: The former Chicago Bears defensive back and Super Bowl winner discusses the individuals that have inspired him during his life

programme.title: I Am Heath Ledger
programme.desc: Naomi Watts, Ben Mendelsohn, Ang Lee are among the contributors to a documentary celebrating the life and work of the Australian actor, who died in 2008

programme.title: The Essex Murders: Who Killed Goldfinger?
programme.desc: Investigating the unsolved 2015 murder of John Palmer, who was nicknamed Goldfinger after his involvement in melting down gold from the 1983 Brinks-Mat robbery. Palmer was found dead in his Essex garden and while police originally believed he died of natural causes, they eventually confirmed the case was being treated as a professional hit

programme.title: The Essex Murders: Who Killed Goldfinger?
programme.desc: The search for John Palmers killer leads to Tenerife, where he built a timeshare empire. Undercover stings and Russian mob ties expose the scale of his power

programme.title: The Essex Murders: Who Killed Goldfinger?
programme.desc: A professional hitman is suspected in John Palmers murder, with evidence pointing to a cartel and an Eastern European enforcer
