programme.desc: A profile of former Manchester United manager Matt Busby, who transformed football through a career of great talent and tragedy. Featuring previously unseen archive footage and interviews with those who knew the man best

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: The life and career of the English actor, known for his roles in Schindlers List, The Grand Budapest Hotel and The Menu

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: The life and career of the American actress, whose films include The Shape of Water, Fruitvale Station, Hidden Figures, and The Help, for which she won an Academy Award

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: The life and work of Sidney Lumet, who was Oscar-nominated for his direction of 12 Angry Men, Dog Day Afternoon, Network and The Verdict

programme.title: Being Mary Tyler Moore
programme.desc: Documentary charting the life and career of the comedy actor, and her lasting influence on the portrayal and roles of women in film and TV

programme.title: Love Means Zero (2017)
programme.desc: Documentary about famed tennis coach Nick Bollettieri, who guided the likes of Jim Courier, Monica Seles and Andre Agassi to glory, but his success came at a terrible personal cost

programme.title: Pantani: The Accidental Death of a Cyclist
programme.desc: Documentary about the rise and fall of Marco Pantani, the maverick Italian cyclist found dead less than six years after winning the Tour de France

programme.title: Hill
programme.desc: A profile of ex-Formula One driver Damon Hill, revealing how he overcame the adversity of losing his father Graham to follow in his footsteps and become world champion himself

programme.title: My Icon
programme.desc: The former Bradford Bulls and St Helens star discusses the individuals that have inspired him in his life and sporting career

programme.title: Williams and Mansell: Red 5
programme.desc: Documentary charting the rise of Nigel Mansell, the Williams F1 racing team and how they came together to fight for the Formula 1 World Drivers Championship

programme.title: My Icon
programme.desc: The former sprint superstar and Olympic gold medalist discusses the individuals that have inspired him in his life and career

programme.title: David Holmes: The Boy Who Lived
programme.desc: Documentary telling the story of Daniel Radcliffes Harry Potter stunt double David Holmes, who was left paralysed from the chest down after an on-set accident in 2009. Featuring personal footage shot over the last decade, behind-the-scenes material from Holmess stunt work, scenes of his current life and interviews with David as well as Daniel Radcliffe, friends, family and former crewmates

programme.title: My Icon
programme.desc: The former paralympian discusses the individuals that have inspired her

programme.title: 2000 Meters to Andriivka
programme.desc: Documentary following a Ukrainian platoon as they traverse a heavily fortified mile of forest to liberate a strategic village from Russian forces

programme.title: Flight 149: Hostage of War
programme.desc: The story of the passengers of a British Airways flight who were held hostage in 1990 after the plane landed in Kuwait City while Iraqi forces were invading the country

programme.title: The Stroll (2023)
programme.desc: The history of New Yorks Meatpacking District told from the point of view of transgender sex workers who lived and worked there

programme.title: Forced Out (2023)
programme.desc: The stories of men and women dishonourably discharged from the Army, Navy and RAF because of their sexuality, with many imprisoned, having medals removed or losing their service pensions

programme.title: The Ibiza Affair: Uncovered
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the rise and fall of Heinz-Christian Strache and the role journalism plays in controlling those in power

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: The life and work of American film-maker and choreographer director Stanley Donen, best known for co-directing On the Town and Singin in the Rain with Gene Kelly

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The ancient mysteries that exist on the islands of Malta, which could be connected to alien visitation. These are enormous, megalithic structures and a vast underground complex containing the remains of what some believe to be otherworldly beings

programme.title: Alien Corridors
programme.desc: Built on swamp and sandy loam, all that grows in the Pine Barrens are the weeds of civilisation. However, there seems to be something about this barren land with its pygmy pines, high winds and frequent foresters that attracts alien attention

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: Inspired by the stories of his shipwrecked relatives, Ross heads up to the Royal Navys historic naval base in the far northerly Orkney Islands, Scapa Flow. Here, Ross and dive supervisor Neil Brock link up with expert local dive guide Emily Turton and head out into the water to dive on Second World War wrecks. Ross and Emily explore a captured German scout ship called the F2 and recover a slew of artefacts that could be linked to Rosss two relatives who died serving in the Royal Navy during the conflict. Ross investigates how Winston Churchill hit upon a revolutionary tactic to defend Scapa Flow from U-boat attacks, as the wreck of the sunken SS Tabarka finally gives up its secrets

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.sub-title: East: Stone Age Engineering and Battle of Bullecourt
programme.desc: Alice Roberts investigates the best archaeological discoveries of 2018 from the East of the UK, including an ancient lost monument as old as Stonehenge uncovered in Suffolk, a dig at the site of Britains first tank battle, and a coin hoard that offers an insight into the effect the English civil war had on the lives of ordinary people

programme.title: Mysteries from Above
programme.desc: How the pyramids of Giza could be a giant map of the stars. Plus, an Indonesian volcano burning a shade of blue, the forgotten pleasures of Americas recent past and how first responders brought hope to the survivors of Hurricane Katrina

programme.title: Dirty Old Cars
programme.desc: Jeremy and his team are confronted with a Mercury Cougar filled with over 15 years of cat urine. A Toyota 4Runner covered in dog hair finally gets groomed

programme.title: Dirty Old Cars
programme.desc: In Georgia, a cockroach-infested 1940s Ford goes from disgusting to deluxe. Then, in North Carolina a beat-up BMW transforms into a bright shiny beamer

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: How, since the dawn of aviation, pilots have experienced unexplainable events in the sky. Accounts include UFOs taking control of their aircraft and entire jets disappearing into thin air

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The ancient mysteries that exist on the islands of Malta, which could be connected to alien visitation. These are enormous, megalithic structures and a vast underground complex containing the remains of what some believe to be otherworldly beings

programme.title: Historys Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Douglas A-1 Skyraider, an aircraft capable of delivering the payload of a B-17, in a single post war air frame. The many variants of this single-piston engined fighter bomber helped dominate the air-to-ground attack role in Vietnam, earning itself quite a reputation

programme.title: Historys Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Grumman Avenger, which was the most important carrier-based torpedo bomber on American and British carriers throughout the Second World War. They were also the biggest and heaviest carrier aircraft of the conflict

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.sub-title: West: Roman Bathhouse and Hessian Camp
programme.desc: Alice Roberts investigates the best archaeological discoveries of 2018 from the West of the UK, including the biggest maritime excavation since the Mary Rose which revealed the extraordinary story of the HMS Invincible, a buried German military camp in Hampshire, and a monumental Roman Bathhouse in Silchester

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts sets off across Hadrians Wall to reveal the forgotten story of the Roman Armys secret weapon in Britain - their cavalry. The programme also follows team of archaeologists and historical re-enactors as they attempt to re-stage a Roman cavalry tournament for a public display in Carlisle

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: The actor travels dives even deeper on shipwrecks of major historical importance, exploring the remnants of some of the most significant moments in British history. He dives on shipwrecks around the British coastline to reveal some of the nations murkiest and best-kept secrets, beginning with the site of Britains most famous wreck - the Mary Rose. Ross is accompanied by dive master Neil Brock and tank expert and safety diver Mark Culwick

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: Ross continues his diving quest in the crystal clear waters of the Red Sea off the coast of Egypt. Its a deeply personal journey as his grandfather fought in the North Africa campaign during ther Second World War

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: How, since the dawn of aviation, pilots have experienced unexplainable events in the sky. Accounts include UFOs taking control of their aircraft and entire jets disappearing into thin air

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The ancient mysteries that exist on the islands of Malta, which could be connected to alien visitation. These are enormous, megalithic structures and a vast underground complex containing the remains of what some believe to be otherworldly beings

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: How the capture of a key Nazi uncovered shocking realities. Amid demands for accountability, spymistress Vera Atkins and her team had to navigate murky waters to confront uncomfortable truths

programme.title: The Secret Nazi Expeditions
programme.desc: Runes are the letters of an ancient Germanic writing. Himmler made rune studies obligatory for SS officers as he believed they held mystical power and even placed protective runes on SS uniforms and buildings

programme.title: WWIIs Most Daring Raids
programme.desc: Detailing how an elite group of British paratroopers managed to launch a midnight raid in order to capture Hitlers unusual radar equipment

programme.title: Clash of Ancient Warriors
programme.desc: The Battle of Thermopylae, fought in 480 BC between the Achaemenid Persian Empire under Xerxes I and an alliance of Greek city-states led by Sparta under Leonidas I. The Persians ultimately claimed victory

programme.title: Clash of Ancient Warriors
programme.sub-title: The Battle of the Teutoburg Forest
programme.desc: The Battle of Teutoburg Forest, contested in 9AD, when an alliance of Germanic peoples ambushed Roman legions and their auxiliaries. Romes eventual defeat not only stopped the growth of its empire, but also created the Latin-Germanic divide that persists in Western Europe to this day

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise and Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: A fresh look at the Third Reich from a global and current perspective. This episode recalls how a social protest turned into a racist and anti-Jewish movement during the 1920s. The NSDAP deliberately used emotions to gain the loyalty of the people

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise and Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: Events of 1933 and 1934 when President Hindenburg signed a decree in 1933 that suspended freedom of speech. It would be one of his last actions before his death from lung cancer. Also in this era, the first concentration camps for political opponents were set up

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: How, since the dawn of aviation, pilots have experienced unexplainable events in the sky. Accounts include UFOs taking control of their aircraft and entire jets disappearing into thin air

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The worlds top 10 mysterious devices, from strange, grooved disks found in a cave in China to an ancient Greek computer to an incredible crystal skull unearthed in Mexico

programme.title: The Nostradamus Effect
programme.desc: An attempt to identify the third antichrist, based on clues in the alleged prophets writings apparently indicating that Napoleon and Hitler would be the first two

programme.title: Hitlers Coup 1923
programme.desc: The infamous Beer Hall Putsch of November 1923, an attempt by Adolf Hitler to take power in Germany by force. Though it failed, it was a day that would change the world for ever, birthing Hitlers regime

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise and Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: A fresh look at the Third Reich from a global and current perspective, telling how the Nazis conquered Germany and then half of Europe within a few years of losing the First World War. The survivors and the winners from the war wanted to blame the Germans. No one knew whether the Germans had really broken with the Nazis

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.sub-title: The Jericho Head, The Cloudbuster and the Map
programme.desc: Perplexing historical objects include the Jericho Head, a 9,000-year-old clay-covered artifact. Plus, a 1950s machine built to control the weather and a map that could be the oldest ever found

programme.title: Ancient Superstructures
programme.desc: An exploration of Tikal, one of the largest archaeological sites and urban centres of pre-Columbian Mayan civilisation. Hidden in the heart of the rainforest, Tikal was the capital of the most powerful kingdom that the Maya built

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The worlds top 10 pyramid sites, from a valley in Peru with over 250 hidden pyramids to an ancient Greek city with mysterious 4,800-year-old ruins to Egypts famous Giza Plateau

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The worlds top 10 mysterious devices, from strange, grooved disks found in a cave in China to an ancient Greek computer to an incredible crystal skull unearthed in Mexico

programme.title: Historys Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The military helicopter Bell UH-1 series was designed and built by the Bell Helicopter Company in the late 1950s as a multipurpose machine. It later became synonymous with the Vietnam War, being used to transport troops and equipment as well as for air-assault missions

programme.title: Historys Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Junkers Ju 52, which is considered one of the most famous airplanes in history. It was first designed as an airliner, but was used as a transport, bomber, and air ambulance during the Second World War

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.sub-title: East: Stone Age Engineering and Battle of Bullecourt
programme.desc: Alice Roberts investigates the best archaeological discoveries of 2018 from the East of the UK, including an ancient lost monument as old as Stonehenge uncovered in Suffolk, a dig at the site of Britains first tank battle, and a coin hoard that offers an insight into the effect the English civil war had on the lives of ordinary people

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts shares the best archaeological discoveries of 2018, starting with the North of the UK and a preserved prehistoric village at the black Loch in Myrton. The programme also follows archaeologists uncovering a previously unknown Anglo-Saxon cemetery in Lincolnshire, and a major regeneration project in Salford, unearthing the largest jail in Georgian England. Cameras join the hunt for a lost Second World War reconnaissance Spitfire in Norway and enjoy privileged access to the conservation labs at Vindolanda Roman fort to see what really happens when the digging stops

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: Ross hops from Portsmouth to Plymouth and explores a coastline littered with treasures. A bout of hypercapnia leaves him shaken after the dive of a 17th-century shipwreck

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: Ross goes on the hunt for wrecks that tell the story of D-Day, the 1944 Allied invasion of Occupied France, and discovers how winning wasnt just a case of superior firepower and numbers, but also ingenuity

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The worlds top 10 pyramid sites, from a valley in Peru with over 250 hidden pyramids to an ancient Greek city with mysterious 4,800-year-old ruins to Egypts famous Giza Plateau

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The worlds top 10 mysterious devices, from strange, grooved disks found in a cave in China to an ancient Greek computer to an incredible crystal skull unearthed in Mexico

programme.title: Life After People
programme.desc: Geologists, climatologists and archaeologists give their ideas about what would happen to cars, planes and roads in a world without humans, and the potential disasters created by unmanned oil refineries

programme.title: Life After People
programme.desc: Experts discuss the dangers of water in a world without human beings, speculating on what would happen if rainwater submerged New Orleans and corrosion toppled Seattles Space Needle

programme.title: Hitlers British Island
programme.desc: Part one of two. How the Channel Island of Alderney became a pre-occupation of Nazi leader Adolf Hitler and under German control was transformed into one of the most heavily fortified places on Earth. Away from prying eyes, the Nazis also established a concentration camp - the only one on British soil - amid the idyllic scenery of woodlands and silver sand beaches

programme.title: Hitlers British Island
programme.desc: Part two of two. On the orders of Adolf Hitler, the Nazi invaders of Alderney, a tiny island in the English Channel, shipped in more than 5,000 slave labourers to build an astonishing series of fortifications designed to protect the island from attack

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: A look at some of the darker elements of the MK Ultra programme, which sought out a miracle mind control method via human experimentation.. Narrated by Jamie Theakston

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War
programme.desc: With the United States joining the conflict, Western forces brought the war to the Axis front - with extreme costs. Meanwhile, German civilians were touched by devastation

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War
programme.desc: Japans expansion into South East Asia, which saw the Allies attempt to block the empires aggression. The war in the Pacific subsequently became even more brutal

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The worlds top 10 pyramid sites, from a valley in Peru with over 250 hidden pyramids to an ancient Greek city with mysterious 4,800-year-old ruins to Egypts famous Giza Plateau

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: A look at the accounts of modern-day alien abductees. Plus, the possibility that bizarre Paracas skulls discovered by Julio Tello could be of extraterrestrial origin

programme.title: Discovered by Disaster
programme.desc: Unexpected things revealed by catastrophic disasters, featuring a submerged funerary complex in Greece, ancient mammal footprints preserved by a Turkish volcanic eruption and North American fossils from the post-dinosaur era

programme.title: Discovered by Disaster
programme.desc: A Bronze Age village, a Notre Dame fire and a 19th-century grave reveal ancient lifestyles. Tar pits showcase extinct mammals and shed light on prehistoric climate change

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies
programme.desc: Craig joins forces with space journalist Sarah Cruddas to investigate some of the most perplexing UFO encounters of recent times. Here the duo recall the infamous Rendlesham Forest incident of 1980. The sightings occurred just outside RAF Woodbridge, Suffolk, which was used at the time by the United States Air Force

programme.title: Conspiracy Files: Unsealed
programme.desc: After the successes of animal cloning, experts assess when human cloning may become possible

programme.title: Conspiracy Files: Unsealed
programme.desc: Experts ask if the bigfoot - a half-man, half-ape - is simply a figment of the imagination, or if he is being hidden from the public eye

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel takes a youthful approach to an old but precious project

programme.title: Secret Sex Lives of Tyrants
programme.desc: The sexual power plays, obsessions and abuses that influenced rulers reigns - and sometimes the fate of nations - continuing with Saddam Hussein

programme.title: Ultimate Mysteries
programme.desc: Experts investigate the US governments experiments into teleportation. They also dig into strange happenings at Mount Shasta and Skinwalker ranch

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Origins
programme.desc: Compilation of the most compelling mysteries featured on the Ancient Aliens series

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Spencer drops into the shop with some tasty new finds, but will Rick bite? Plus, Chum and Rick meet up with a magician

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike Wolfe embarks on a remarkable discovery in upstate New York. As he explores the region, he stumbles upon an extraordinary camera collection - a once-in-a-lifetime find that promises to captivate both collectors and enthusiasts alike. Meanwhile, Robbie Wolfe finds himself immersed in another thrilling adventure as he encounters a massive stash of junior dream cars

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Origins
programme.desc: Compilation of the most compelling mysteries featured on the Ancient Aliens series

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Documentary following the lives of men living off the land in some of Americas most inhospitable mountain ranges. Lauro nears Iditarod finish line through the icy Bering Sea coast. Marty and Dave transport cabin supplies across unstable frozen river water, Tom and Will construct elk hide tipi, while Jake and dogs chase a black bear into a mountain cave

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Documentary following those living in the wilderness. Marty Meierotto guides his daughter Noah through her first bush plane landing at a caribou camp. Mike hauls a large gangway to his remote Kodiak homestead, while Bret and Ivy have to fend off a bear that is raiding their salmon nets.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: Documentary following brothers Marty and Rick Lagina as they search for the mysterious treasure buried on a Nova Scotia island, which is believed to be protected by a deadly curse

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Everything seems like business as usual in West Covina, until a crazy-looking vintage Mercury Zephyr pulls up, revealing an old friend. Darrell and his buddy stumble over the ultimate Sketch artist. Ivy and his son cant seem to pick a lane, while Kenny and company find the time to make it all worthwhile

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy and Pops try to prove who is the more profitable. Brandis secret weapon lands her more than she bargains for, but luckily Kenny is there to brighten her day

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kennys fear of sharks inspires a controversial wardrobe choice, Rene brings his bargain army along to try to intimidate the competition, while he gets his slice of the loot. Darrell wont take no for an answer, moving full steam ahead

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Barry rolls up to Riverside, California, with his own masked bidder, and the two develop a winning strategy. Brandi and Danielles mystery balls take them to South America. Rene needs a cleanse after going through his risque room

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Lisa inadvertently causes complications in California, while Ivy and his son conjure up a locker with some mysterious sports equipment

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi tries to keep things positive in Perris. Meanwhile, Gunter and Rene lock horns over a locker full of rubbish

programme.title: The Lost City of Ramses II
programme.desc: Part one of two. Ramses the Great is one of the most emblematic pharaohs of Ancient Egypt, who saw in the construction of the city of Pi-Ramses a way to reach power. Professor Henning Franzmeier and his team have recently discovered a splendid palace and treasure room inside the city walls. This documentary follows this unprecedented mission for eight weeks and reveals for the first time the true history of the lost city of Ramses the Great

programme.title: The Lost City of Ramses II
programme.desc: Part two of two. Henning Franzmeier and his team of archaeologists continue their search for the truth about Ramses the Greats lost city, uncovering new secrets and fascinating finds

programme.title: Black Death Patient Zero
programme.desc: The first in a two-part documentary tracing the roots of the worlds deadliest pandemic. Historian Philip Slavin reveals the devastation inflicted on Europe by the 14th-century plague outbreak, which killed an estimated 200 million people

programme.title: Black Death Patient Zero
programme.desc: The concluding part of the documentary follows the work of historian Philip Slavin and biologists Dr Johanes Krause and Dr Maria Spyrou as they bring together new research with cutting-edge ancient DNA analysis to uncover patient zero

programme.title: The Last Hunt for Nazi Gold
programme.desc: Stepping into stolen art secrets and uncovering the hidden masterpieces, Altausse mine myths and the obsession behind Hitlers art dream

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Perched high on a volcanic crag overlooking the River Forth, Stirling has long been one of the most strategically important castles in Britain. Guarding the gateway to the Highlands, its battle-scarred walls have witnessed savagery and chivalry, intrigue, alchemy, adultery and murder. With the aid of location filming, aerial shots and dramatic reconstructions, Dan Jones examines the history of this stronghold and relates the stories of some of the powerful characters who have owned it over the centuries

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the history of Carrickfergus Castle in Co Antrim, one of the most ancient castles in Northern Ireland and a stronghold key to understanding the tempestuous relationship between Britain and Ireland. Dan travels to Rathlin island, where he reveals how hundreds of women and children were massacred in the name of Elizabeth I, and visits the tomb of former governor Arthur Chichester, who began a new colonisation strategy using scorched earth tactics and laid waste to much of the land surrounding the town

programme.title: Royal Kill List
programme.desc: Dramatised-documentary followingCharles IIs hunt for his fathers killers, known as regicides This is a story about espionage, revenge, power, loyalty and the moment that changed the landscape of British politics and society for ever. Sheila Atim is the storyteller for the Royalists and Jared Harris for the Regicides. With Joseph Fiennes

programme.title: Royal Kill List
programme.desc: Charles II faces a backlash for his treatment of the regicides so he cracks down on dissenters while simultaneously organising a lavish coronation he hopes will cement his rule. But as day of his crowning approaches, the king learns that some of the most feared regicides have fled abroad where they are already spreading their republican ideas. Dramatised-documentary, featuring Sheila Atim, Jared Harris and Joseph Fiennes

programme.title: Royal Kill List
programme.desc: Charles dispatches assassins to Europe in an attempt to stamp his power abroad, but his authority begins to unravel at home as his Queen publicly challenges him. Dramatised-documentary, featuring Sheila Atim, Jared Harris and Joseph Fiennes

programme.title: Historys Deadliest with Ving Rhames
programme.desc: The actor reveals some of the extraordinary deaths caused by engineering disasters throughout history

programme.desc: The fast-paced world of shipping port auctions. The Israelis go after what they think is vintage clothing. Meanwhile, a custom container could land a buyer in jail

programme.desc: Four containers bound for Russias Winter Games miss the boat and a Major League baseball player shows up to help Mo and Ty

programme.desc: The bidding is keen on a selection of hot items from New Orleans - even though it is said they have been struck by a voodoo curse. Later, a refrigerated unit sends chills down bidders spines

programme.desc: Archeologists in Russia unearth an astonishing number of mass graves. A Second World War-era American military plane is found on a Canadian mountain. Strange cosmic rays coming from Antarcticas ice have physicists stumped

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: Visits to the most remote, cold and inhospitable places on the planet to reveal great mysteries that have been frozen in time. This episode considers Ecuadors mountain mystery

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: A team attempts to locate a Second World War British plane that went missing in Iceland. Fossils are found in an Alaskan riverbank. In Antarctica an undiscovered depression in the ice is investigated, while in Russia, 34,000-year-old graves are discovered

programme.title: Greatest Prison Escapes with Billy Hayes
programme.desc: Hayes recalls how eight inmates escaped from the Curry County Adult Detention Center in Clovis, New Mexico, in August 2008 after climbing prison pipes, using homemade instruments to carve a hole in the roof and leaping from the building

programme.title: Greatest Prison Escapes with Billy Hayes
programme.desc: The exploits of British criminal Alfie Hinds who, while serving a 12-year prison sentence for robbery, broke out of three high security prisons in the 1950s. His actions earned him the nickname Houdini

programme.title: Original Gangsters with Sean Bean
programme.desc: The actor takes a deep dive through a rogues gallery of some of the most notorious criminals in history. This episode focuses on the Peaky Blinders. Although the gang is fictional, it is loosely based on a real urban youth gang active in the city from the 1880s to the 1920s. Featuring cinematic re-enactment and expert talking-head interviews to bring these infamous characters to life, like never before

programme.title: Original Gangsters with Sean Bean
programme.desc: The actor shines the spotlight on Al Capone, Alcatraz?s most famous resident, who basically created the gangster archetype seen on screen - and the streets. programme.title: Digging Up Britains Past
programme.desc: Archaeologists conduct a dig at Auckland Castle in Co Durham, which 700 years ago was home to a group of power-crazed bishops who behaved more like warriors than religious leaders. The experts head to Dirleton Castle in East Lothian to reveal the role one of the men played in defending England from William Wallaces army, and also try their hands at the art of stained glass-making, and fire a working trebuchet - the ultimate medieval weapon of war

programme.title: Digging Up Britains Past
programme.desc: Centuries ago, canals were the liquid highways of Britain, transporting raw materials and finished goods all over the country. Their arrival kick-started the Industrial Revolution, which was to turn Britain into a superpower. The very first water superhighway was the Bridgewater Canal, completed in 1761 to carry coal to Manchester from the mines in Worsley. Here, a team of archaeologists from Salford University roots out this industrial past, working with volunteers to excavate the very coal mine that inspired the creation of the canal

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist examines the world of flight, travelling across the globe to chart the evolutionary story of those creatures who seemingly defy the rules of gravity by taking to the air. Initially focusing on insects, Attenborough meets a descendant of the dragonfly, before examining the Atlas beetle, which tends to restrict flight to times when it needs a mate or a fresh supply of food. More aesthetically pleasing is a group of beautiful tropical butterflies, followed by an in-depth study into the blow fly - the jet fighter of insects

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist visits the jungles of Borneo to meet creatures that like to glide through life - the harlequin tree frog and the little-known colugo - often referred to, incorrectly, as a flying lemur. He also has a CGI-assisted encounter with the first true vertebrate flyer, the pterosaur, receives a flying lesson from a small flock of swans at Loch Lomond in Scotland and encounters the planets largest species of bat

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist turns his attention to creatures that dominate the skies today. He begins with the vast bird family, watching a group of vultures as they go scavenging and some peregrine falcons dive bombing for their prey. He then moves on to the floating forests of Ecuador to find out what makes the humble hummingbird tick, before ending his journey at the Gomantong bat caves of Borneo - a place he first filmed in 1972 - witnessing a mass exodus of the creatures

programme.desc: Off Menu podcast co-host James Acaster returns to stand-up with a comedy special, filmed in the round in front of a live audience at the Royal and Derngate Theatre in Northampton, close to Acasters hometown of Kettering, Hecklers Welcome challenges the comedian to tolerate interruptions from the crowd. As he milks laughter from his formative childhood experiences, Acaster volleys barbs from punters and muses on his troubled relationship with the art of performance

programme.title: Warehouse 13
programme.desc: Part two of two. Secret service agents Myka and Peter ease into their roles at Warehouse 13, discovering the treasures it holds, and meet Lena, the proprietor of a BandB near the base. Sci-fi drama, starring Eddie McClintock, Joanne Kelly and Saul Rubinek

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness the best and worst behaviour on the nations busiest motorway

programme.title: Motorway Patrol

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary series from New Zealand following the madness and mayhem faced by intrepid officers as they pull over motorists for a variety of suspected offences

programme.title: A Cheetahs Pride
programme.desc: Inara searches for her kidnapped cubs and Chilli stalks a warthog, while struggling to keep all nine of the young cheetahs fed

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: Arizonas Paria Plateau, a true geological marvel, consisting of sweeping canyons bound by towering cliffs and fossilised dunes striped in desert red

programme.title: The Kimberley: Australias Wild West
programme.desc: A look at Australias Wild West - The Kimberley - the animals who live there and tracking the quests of those working to protect them

programme.title: Wildlife ER
programme.desc: Vet Karina fights to save a koala mauled by dogs. Plus, rescue Chantel tries to pick up a peeved possum, while vet Meaghan bonds with a gaggle of goslings

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: An underwater cave system hidden in the crystal clear waters of Cozumel in the Caribbean

programme.title: Arabian Inferno
programme.desc: The Arabian Peninsula, the worlds transit hub for flocks of birds migrating between Europe, Africa and Asia, which has billions of flying visitors every year

programme.title: My Best Friends an Animal
programme.desc: Following Shanet, who spends her days tending to the needs of penguin Harold Custard, and Barista, who cares for Cindy the baboon

programme.title: My Best Friends an Animal
programme.desc: Theres a celebration for Cash the house donkeys birthday, Milton the skunk plays hide-and-seek . Cameras also follow Bjornar the beaver, who has an essential job

programme.title: Survival of the Beast
programme.desc: Max Djenohan embarks on a mission to unlock and mimic the survival skills of some of the most charismatic animals on Earth

programme.title: Survival of the Beast
programme.desc: Max Djenohan embarks on a mission to unlock and mimic the survival skills of some of the most charismatic animals on Earth

programme.title: Bugs That Ruled the World
programme.desc: Exploring how the praying mantis has the agility of a martial artist and an appetite for everything from flies to hummingbirds

programme.title: Bugs That Ruled the World
programme.desc: How beetles keep ecosystems in balance with biological weapons like tusks and toxic sprays and why they are the worlds unsung heroes

programme.title: The Island of Giants
programme.desc: Exploring how whale sharks drive the culture of Santa Maria, the only European hotspot for these giants and why warming seas may be drawing them in

programme.title: The Kimberley: Australias Wild West
programme.desc: A look at Australias Wild West - The Kimberley - the animals who live there and tracking the quests of those working to protect them

programme.title: Irelands Wild Islands with Eoin Warner
programme.desc: The wildlife presenter sails a 140-year-old Galway hooker out into the Atlantic to showcase Irelands western islands. Eoin starts his island voyage on Rathlin, then heads west for Malin Head and Inishtrahull, seeing basking sharks and dolphins, before going south to Achill Island

programme.title: Irelands Wild Islands with Eoin Warner
programme.desc: Eoin visits a native woodland on Clare Island and as he sails through Connemaras waters, he finds deserted islands home to skylarks and Irelands only native reptile on the Aran Islands

programme.title: Irelands Wild Islands with Eoin Warner
programme.desc: Eoin is back in his Galway hooker and sails to the islands off Co Kerry, before heading south to his home waters off Cork and ending his journey at Fastnet Rock

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough employs the latest technologies to explore the violence, rivalries and deadly weaponry existing within the world of bugs. This first episode examines the survival tactics of its terrifying residents including killer ants, trap-setting spiders and beetles with the ability to shoot boiling chemicals at their enemies

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster continues his bug-eyed view of the world of creepy-crawlies, revealing how predators defuse the defences of their prey. Highlights include the cockroach wasp, busy preparing a tasty - and very live - treat for its young, the whirligig beetle, which employs a water-based radar system, and the jumping portia spider, which feeds on other arachnids

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A further selection of creepy-crawly close-ups, focusing on courtship in the bug world. Highlights include scorpions shaking their booty, the perfume-wearing nasonia wasp and the tropical cricket, for whom romance goes out of the window as it uses bribery to seal the deal with would-be partners. One potential partner to steer well clear of, however, is the praying mantis, the female of which is notorious for eating the male just after - or even during - mating. Narrated by David Attenborough

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A close-up view of sex, bug-style, as David Attenborough talks viewers through the different ways in which creepy-crawlies reproduce. Size matters for the minuscule male orb spider, creepily sneaking up on its intended and trying to mate without her noticing, while theres no rest for the lothario-like butterfly, which has plenty of notches on its proverbial bedpost. However, the harvestman spider has no use for sex at all, and reproduces by cloning itself

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough shifts the focus to bugs that prefer co-operation rather than conflict. They include burrowing cockroaches, the suitably named social spiders - which share a 30-metre web - the queen bee and her happy hive of workers and green ants pulling together to build a nest

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster concludes his close-up examination of the creepy-crawly world, shifting focus to the bugs ultimate invention - the colony. Key residents of these minuscule mega-cities include honey bees, termites, leafcutter ants - who have a knack for farming - and their Argentine cousins, members of a community so vast it spans an entire continent

programme.title: A Cheetahs Pride
programme.desc: Inara searches for her kidnapped cubs and Chilli stalks a warthog, while struggling to keep all nine of the young cheetahs fed

programme.title: Big Cat Country
programme.desc: Documentary about three dynasties of lions, with the MK pride defending the territory they have held for years from the all-male Nomad pride and the all-female Hollywood pride

programme.title: Over Australia
programme.desc: Two-party documentary featuring aerial footage of the Australian wilderness, beginning with the vast, dry plains of the interior, featuring the monolithic red rock of Uluru and the bounding red kangaroo

programme.title: Over Australia
programme.desc: Part two of two. Aerial footage of the Great Dividing Range, spanning thousands of miles along the eastern edge of Australia and separating two very different worlds

programme.title: The Kimberley: Australias Wild West
programme.desc: Stepping into the wild and exploring Earths greatest savannah, cameras capture ancient fire traditions and a sugar gliders daring escape from the flames

programme.title: Big Cat Country
programme.desc: Documentary about three dynasties of lions, with the MK pride defending the territory they have held for years from the all-male Nomad pride and the all-female Hollywood pride

programme.title: Wild Philippines
programme.desc: Discovering a world shaped by fire and water, as cameras capture Philippine eagles soaring above ancient forests and rare crocodiles lurking below the rivers surface

programme.title: Supersenses
programme.desc: Animals sense and interpret their world in ways that are far beyond our human capabilities. This documentary series begins by exploring animal vision, a world where dragonflies see in almost every direction, a tiny crustacean boasts hexnocular vision and pigeons see 10 times the colour that humans can

programme.title: Supersenses
programme.desc: The documentary asks what makes a truly super-powered animal, scouring the globe for the strangest and most surprising animal skills and, in a round of competitive challenges, revealing which creature holds the title for super strength, most toxic, master of disguise, greatest escape artist and master builder

programme.title: Supersenses
programme.desc: The amazing world of what animals really see with their extraordinary senses, thanks to remarkable CGI and innovative film techniques

programme.title: Strange Creatures
programme.desc: The weirdest wildlife wonders of the natural world, including a very strange plant, as well as four animals known for their bad toilet etiquette

programme.title: Strange Creatures
programme.desc: The weirdest-looking birds are often also the most incredible survivors. Check out the winged weirdos whose strange looks keep them alive

programme.title: Strange Creatures
programme.desc: Some of the most hideous animals in the world owe their survival to their bad looks. They may be grotesque but their evolution is amazing

programme.title: Strange Creatures
programme.desc: The world is full of creepy crawlies that make people squirm, but dont be fooled by their looks - these animals have serious survival skills

programme.title: Wild Castles
programme.desc: Explore the historic home of an extraordinary family of birds of prey in a look at the wildlife living in the nature reserve surrounding Germanys Heidelberg Castle

programme.title: Wild Castles
programme.desc: The flocks of birds, families of wild boar and armies of insects that thrive in and around the centuries-old French fortress of Carcassonne

programme.title: Africas Hidden Kingdoms
programme.desc: The wonders of Africas most amazing landscapes, beginning at the Drakensberg mountain range, where baboons and eland are just some of the creatures coping with a hostile environment featuring cliffs that rise sharply from the landscape

programme.title: Africas Hidden Kingdoms
programme.desc: The Cloud Mountains of South Africa, a hidden world that serve as a window to an ancient time

programme.title: 13 Hours To Survive
programme.desc: Get swept up in a gladiatorial fight for survival as the ocean recedes and sea animals of all kinds struggle between life and death in tide pools

programme.title: 13 Hours To Survive
programme.desc: A gladiatorial fight for survival as the ocean recedes and sea animals of all kinds struggle between life and death in tide pools

programme.title: Age of the Big Cats
programme.desc: Three-part documentary telling the stories of the cheetah, the snow leopard and the jaguar, using night vision systems, super slow-motion cameras and 3D computer-generated imagery to unpack their extraordinary trajectory and witness their ascent to predator status

programme.title: Age of the Big Cats
programme.desc: The series unravels a story of world domination through the plight of the lion and the tiger. Travelling back in time, the documentary tells a story of adaptation and survival to reveal how lions conquered the world and the tiger became the real undisputed king of the jungle

programme.title: Age of the Big Cats
programme.desc: The stories of the puma and the leopard, following their evolution and adaptation through the Ice Age and unravelling a story that spans two million years of history

programme.title: Wild Philippines
programme.desc: Discovering a world shaped by fire and water, as cameras capture Philippine eagles soaring above ancient forests and rare crocodiles lurking below the rivers surface

programme.title: The Kimberley: Australias Wild West
programme.desc: Stepping into the wild and exploring Earths greatest savannah, cameras capture ancient fire traditions and a sugar gliders daring escape from the flames

programme.title: David Attenboroughs First Life
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part documentary, the naturalist explores the origins of life on Earth. Beginning the journey near his childhood home in Charnwood Forest, Leicestershire, he learns how a fossil discovery transformed scientists understanding of the evolution of complex organisms, and in Newfoundland and Australia he reveals the earliest kinds of animal to exist on the planet. With the help of cutting-edge technology and visual effects, the programme brings the creatures to life, demonstrating how they survived

programme.title: David Attenboroughs First Life
programme.desc: In the conclusion of the two-part documentary, the naturalist travels to Burgess Shale in Canadas Rocky Mountains, where he explores how evolution gained pace once creatures developed mouths and mobility. In Scotland, he reveals that one of the smallest fossils found holds the secret to how animals began surviving on dry land, and explains the bloom of life during the oxygen-rich Carboniferous period

programme.title: The Bachelor King
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the lives of king penguins, filmed on the sub-Antarctic island of South Georgia over five months. The programme imagines what one penguins life would be, following it during the challenging, awkward time between adolescence and adulthood. Presented by David Attenborough

programme.title: Wild Philippines
programme.desc: Discovering a world shaped by fire and water, as cameras capture Philippine eagles soaring above ancient forests and rare crocodiles lurking below the rivers surface

programme.title: Gangs of Baboon Falls
programme.desc: The fortunes of competing troops of baboons as they battle for territorial supremacy around the Victoria Falls on the border of Zimbabwe and Zambia. As lockdown continues, the streets of Victoria Falls are empty, and the gangs must find new ways to survive in a strangely changed world

programme.title: Animals Decoded
programme.desc: Communication in the animal world, beginning with the secrets of body language

programme.title: Animals Decoded
programme.desc: The remarkable ways that animals speak to one another, from the trumpeting of enormous elephants to the chatter of seal colonies

programme.title: Animals Decoded
programme.desc: Through sense, scent and sight, animals can communicate in ways that are outside of the reach of humans. Here, scientists dig further into their secrets

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: How volcanos have altered the planet. Volcanologist Tom Pfeiffer takes a group to Ertea Ale. However, first they need to cross Ethiopias Danakil Depression - one of the planets most inhospitable places

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: Volcanologist Tom Pfeiffer heads to Indonesia to see if Anak, a son of legendary volcano Krakatoa, is ready to repeat the pattern of its ancestor

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: Italys Mount Etna is one of the best places for volcano watchers. Volcanologist Tom Pfeiffer heads there in the hope of seeing a paroxysmal eruption

programme.title: Zombieland: Double Tap (2019)
programme.desc: A decade after they joined forces, survivors Tallahassee, Columbus, Wichita and Little Rock have become experts in identifying and disposing assorted zombies. They set up their new home in the abandoned White House, but after Little Rock heads to Graceland, the team attempts to save her from a group of super zombies. Director Ruben Fleischers comedy horror sequel, starring Woody Harrelson, Jesse Eisenberg and Emma Stone

programme.title: Twister (1996)
programme.desc: A storm-chaser and her estranged husband are brought together in a joint project to monitor the path of an oncoming tornado - but the pair face a race against the clock as a rival government-backed group with hi-tech resources tries to beat them to it. Action thriller, starring Helen Hunt, Bill Paxton, Cary Elwes, Jami Gertz and Philip Seymour Hoffman

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - April 2026
programme.desc: Previews of the films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey (2012)
programme.desc: Unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins is pulled out of his comfortable life when Gandalf the wizard volunteers him for a dangerous quest. He joins a party of dwarves who are on a mission to reclaim their lost homeland, which has been taken over by a dragon. When the group journeys into the Misty Mountains, Bilbo becomes separated from the dwarves and falls into a cave, where he finds himself confronted by Gollum and forced to play a riddle game. It is set in Middle-earth 60 years before the events of The Lord of the Rings and is the first part of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage, James Nesbitt, Ken Stott, Cate Blanchett, Ian Holm and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug (2013)
programme.desc: The party of dwarves and their hobbit ally continue the quest to reclaim their lost kingdom, journeying through the forest home of ancestral enemy the elves and finally facing the dragon that drove them from their home. Meanwhile, Gandalf the wizard investigates the rise of Necromancer, a mysterious dark power residing in Dol Guldur with the ability to summon the spirits of the dead. Part two of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage and Orlando Bloom, with Luke Evans, Evangeline Lilly and Benedict Cumberbatch

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies (2014)
programme.desc: Dwarf king Thorin reclaims control of his homeland, but his descent into madness places him on the brink of war with his human and elven allies. As Thorins Hobbit friend Bilbo tries to save the tormented ruler from himself, a vast horde of orcs gathers to destroy them all. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Martin Freeman, Richard Armitage, Ian McKellen, Luke Evans and Orlando Bloom

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim (2024)
programme.desc: Helm Hammerhand sits on the throne of Rohan, flanked by sons Hama and Haleth and rebellious daughter Hera. Dunlending lord Freca proposes a marital union between Hera and his son Wulf, which Helm loudly rejects. In a subsequent brawl between fathers, Helm unintentionally lands a fatal blow, so Wulf vows revenge and amasses an army led by General Targg. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Gaia Wise, Brian Cox, Luke Pasqualino and Lorraine Ashbourne

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Monroe investigates a robbery at a church and notes some suspicious activity among its flock. The preacher asks for his help, and it soon emerges that the congregation are all Wesen creatures. David Giuntoli stars

programme.title: Warehouse 13
programme.desc: Steve, Artie and Claudia try to find where Brother Adrian has been hiding, while Myka and Pete attempt to put a stop to a new drug that can make people taller

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick decides the survivors need to change their mentality following their latest loss. However, his announcement infuriates Shane, who accuses him of neglecting the things that matter most - before secretly devising a plan of his own. Meanwhile, dangers lurk in the woods as winter draws nearer, and Carl faces a harsh truth about the future

programme.title: Reginald the Vampire
programme.desc: Reginald will do anything for love with unexpected consequences

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Karl Beattie and Stuart Torevell spend a night alone in the dungeons, and then return 24 hours later for more terror in an attempt to discover whether the ghost of 16th-century poet Sir Fulke Greville is haunting the tower. With guest Ian Lawman

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and Ian Lawman travel to Stoke-on-Trent, where they spend the night in Gladstone Pottery Museum, encountering sudden changes in temperature and flying objects

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riker is sent on a mission to find the starship he once served on, and discovers a secret which threatens to compromise the peace treaty between the Federation and the Romulans. Sci-fi drama, starring Patrick Stewart and Jonathan Frakes

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Worf receives a distress call from his foster brother, who is stationed on Boraal II, and encourages the Enterprise crew to help him save the inhabitants of the planet, which is rapidly self-destructing. Sci-fi drama, starring Patrick Stewart and Michael Dorn

programme.desc: Four of the Enterprises junior officers wait to hear whether theyve won promotion, and one of them, a Bajoran, finds herself sent on a perilous mission into Cardassian space. Sci-fi drama, starring Patrick Stewart

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After losing his memory, Data awakes to find himself stranded on a primitive planet, where the inhabitants fear he might have brought a deadly plague. Sci-fi adventure, starring Patrick Stewart and Brent Spiner

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A fateful journey through an ion storm forces Janeway and Chakotay to crash-land their shuttle on an unexplored planet - where a bizarre phenomenon causes them to re-enact their experiences in an alternative context. Sci-fi drama, starring Kate Mulgrew and Robert Beltran

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: One of the Vulcan crew members enters Pon Farr, the races ferocious mating phase. Sci-fi adventure, starring Kate Mulgrew

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Chakotay replies to a call for help, only to find himself captured by aliens who subject him to an unknown neural procedure. Meanwhile, the crew has an unexpected encounter with the Federations deadliest enemy. Sci-fi drama, starring Robert Beltran

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A brief flirtation with an alien traveller makes Kes wonder where her future lies, while the Doctors meddling has unexpected side-effects. Sci-fi adventure, starring Jennifer Lien and Robert Picardo

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew answers a distress call from a planet on a collision course with a massive asteroid. However, the attempts to vaporise it send fragments hurtling toward a densely populated area, and Neelix is pushed to the limit when Tuvoks attitude becomes unbearable. Sci-fi adventure, starring Ethan Phillips

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug (2013)
programme.desc: The party of dwarves and their hobbit ally continue the quest to reclaim their lost kingdom, journeying through the forest home of ancestral enemy the elves and finally facing the dragon that drove them from their home. Meanwhile, Gandalf the wizard investigates the rise of Necromancer, a mysterious dark power residing in Dol Guldur with the ability to summon the spirits of the dead. Part two of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage and Orlando Bloom, with Luke Evans, Evangeline Lilly and Benedict Cumberbatch

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The destruction of his wife and stepson prompts Hershel to tell the others he wants them off his land once and for all - and then he promptly disappears, raising concerns that he will start drinking again after years of sobriety. As the survivors bury Sophia, Carol refuses to acknowledge the funeral and falls into a deep depression, while Shane and Ricks differences openly erupt. Andrew Lincoln, Scott Wilson, Jon Bernthal and Sarah Wayne Callies star

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick, Hershel and Glenn are trapped by foes both dead and alive following their altercation with two strangers, leading to a fierce shoot-out at the bar. Carol tries to stop Daryl withdrawing from the group, and Shane tries to rescue Lori, who has woken up in her overturned car - with two walkers attempting to get at her through the windscreen

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and Shane take a blindfolded Randall 18 miles away from the farm, hoping to disorientate him enough that he and his fellow raiders will not cause any more trouble for the survivors. However, the two ex-cops disagree over his fate at the last minute, putting themselves in grave danger. Meanwhile, Andrea helps Hershels youngest daughter Beth make a crucial decision

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: After experiencing disturbing visions, Nick discovers a fellow Grimm is torturing and murdering monsters that have harmed humans, spreading panic among the Wesen creatures. Renard and Juliettes connection moves to the next level. David Giuntoli stars

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: A Wesen puts a contract out on Monroe, but the individual approached for the job turns out to be his ex-girlfriend Angelina. Instead of accepting the $25,000 on offer, she unites with Nick to help her former partner avoid his fate. Silas Weir Mitchell stars

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank investigate a murder, which leads them to a dangerously unstable fugitive on the run with his daughter. However, there may be an even greater threat close by

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: A high-school student is killed by a monster, leading Nick and Hank to suspect that a boy competing in an academic competition is trying to eliminate his rivals

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank investigate when a child goes missing, uncovering several similar cases all linked by sightings of a mysterious ghostly presence. It transpires that the Weeping Woman - or La Llorona - is a ghost who kidnaps three children every Halloween and drowns them, hoping their sacrifice can atone for the loss of her own children, whom she also drowned. David Giuntoli stars

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and Ian Lawman travel to Stoke-on-Trent, where they spend the night in Gladstone Pottery Museum, encountering sudden changes in temperature and flying objects

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: After ONeill and the team help relocate displaced aliens to a new homeworld, another civilisation tries to colonise the same planet, leaving the team striving to discover a fair solution to the dilemma. Sci-fi drama, starring Richard Dean Anderson and Amanda Tapping

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: ONeill, Carter, Daniel and Tealc are brainwashed, given new memories and put to work in the mines beneath an ice-covered planet, leaving General Hammond to face the possibility that his team is dead. Sci-fi drama, starring Richard Dean Anderson and Michael Shanks

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Daniel investigates when one of his former professors dies in suspicious circumstances. Discovering the tutor was studying an ancient Egyptian Goauld symbiote, he faces a race against time to save the college from a terrible curse. Michael Shanks and Richard Dean Anderson star

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A lieutenant is found murdered in his quarters, revealing a possible connection to a disturbing dream experienced by Ezri in which she encountered one of Daxs previous hosts. Sci-fi drama, starring Nicole de Boer and Avery Brooks

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A Changeling with an aversion to humanoids forces Odo to reassess his life - sowing seeds of distrust on the station. Sci-fi adventure, starring Avery Brooks and Rene Auberjonois

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: The holosuite malfunctions, trapping DS9s senior staff in a Las Vegas crime caper, where they must save one of the characters from seemingly certain death. Sci-fi adventure, starring Avery Brooks and Rene Auberjonois

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies (2014)
programme.desc: Dwarf king Thorin reclaims control of his homeland, but his descent into madness places him on the brink of war with his human and elven allies. As Thorins Hobbit friend Bilbo tries to save the tormented ruler from himself, a vast horde of orcs gathers to destroy them all. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Martin Freeman, Richard Armitage, Ian McKellen, Luke Evans and Orlando Bloom

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Dr Bashir accepts a dangerous assignment while visiting Romulus and finds himself caught in the middle of a manipulative and murderous plot. Sci-fi adventure, starring Alexander Siddig and Avery Brooks

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Dax defies Siskos decision concerning Worf, but the captain is distracted as he realises his destiny is growing ever more confusing. Starring Avery Brooks and Nicole de Boer

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and Shane decide they must execute Randall for the good of the other survivors, but Dale fears this would mean the group had finally lost its humanity, and pleads with them to spare his life. Hershel begins to bond with Glenn, and Carls emotional traumas leave him feeling increasingly cynical about the future. However, his actions have unintended consequences

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick decides the survivors need to change their mentality following their latest loss. However, his announcement infuriates Shane, who accuses him of neglecting the things that matter most - before secretly devising a plan of his own. Meanwhile, dangers lurk in the woods as winter draws nearer, and Carl faces a harsh truth about the future

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: When a mysterious case of sudden blindness results in a womans death, Nick and Hank encounter an insect-like Wesen that appears to feed off its bereaved victims tears. Meanwhile, Adalind weighs up the significance of her new situation, while Juliette continues to work with Rosalee in an effort to bring her memory back. Russell Hornsby and David Giuntoli star

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Hank reflects on an arrest for murder he made of a man who claimed monsters were involved. With the mans death sentence approaching and the knowledge he has recently acquired from Nick, Hank begins to wonder if the mans absurd claims were true and that he may be innocent of the crime. Meanwhile, Monroe finds himself involved in a situation he never saw coming.

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Adalind returns to avenge her mothers death, and blackmails Renard into helping her. Juliette confesses to Nick that she has feelings for another man

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick finds out about Juliettes relationship with Renard - who is frantically searching for the key - and can barely control the urge for revenge. Monroe and Rosalee piece together information about the curse and eventually work out how the passion spell can be broken. Meanwhile, Adalind returns to Renards duplicitous brother in Vienna

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Three Wesen break the laws of their race by openly revealing their supernatural nature while committing a series of bank robberies, and Juliette is tormented by hallucinations

programme.title: Most Haunted

programme.title: Father Brown

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Richard Poole meets up with a group of old university friends who have arrived on the island for a reunion, only for tragedy to strike when the man who has solved so many murders becomes the victim. Faced with such a sensitive crime, the commissioner quickly drafts in another British inspector to help the team get to the bottom of the mystery. It soon becomes clear that the newcomer, Humphrey Goodman, is just as eccentric as Poole - but he is also just as bright, and wastes no time questioning the partygoers, all of whom are prime suspects, while pondering the biggest mystery of all - how did the culprit commit the crime in full view of all the other guests? Kris Marshall joins the cast, with Ben Miller, Sara Martins and Danny John-Jules

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You

programme.desc: The comedian tries to help make sense of bewildering times as he dissects the weeks news using stand-up, review, discussion and audience interaction. Pointless star Richard Osman shares his thoughts, along with regular panellist Sara Pascoe

programme.title: Rick Steins Road to Mexico
programme.desc: Ricks journey draws to a close as he heads east from Oaxaca to the Yucatan Peninsula, where dishes like Papadzules and Sikil Pak are enjoyed in villages across the countryside. Here, locals feast on the hottest chilli of them all, the Habanero. Rick ends his journey feasting on grilled seafood in Tulum, along the shores of the Caribbean Sea

programme.title: James Mays Cars of the People
programme.desc: The presenter examines the social significance of cars in the 20th century. He begins by travelling to Germany, Italy and Russia to examine how dictators kick-started the mobilization of the masses, finding tales of design brilliance, abject failure, war, fraud and double dealing. James also learns about how the British motor industry blew a gift-wrapped chance to rule the world and he gets his own back with a stunt that means bad news for one of the planets most hated cars

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the comedy panel show in which two teams of celebs try to call each others bluff with a few stories about themselves that might be true or might be out-and-out porkies. programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Lister accidentally triggers off the ships self-destruct sequence, and there is only one way to diffuse the bomb, by lending his body to a female officer. Cult sci-fi comedy, starring Chris Barrie, Craig Charles and Danny John-Jules

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Kryten discovers a developing fluid has mutated, causing photographs to come to life and giving Lister a chance to change the past and avoid ever becoming lost in deep space. Sci-fi comedy, starring Chris Barrie, Craig Charles, Robert Llewellyn and Danny John-Jules

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Kryten discovers his expiry date is less than 24 hours away, prompting Lister and Rimmer to organise a party he will never forget, but when the mechanoid decides to avoid being shut down he does not realise his actions could cost the rest of the crew their lives. Sci-fi comedy, starring Craig Charles and Chris Barrie

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee Mack and Sally Bretton return for the domestic comedy, which sees the couple continuing to go from one disaster to the next, while coping with their three kids, Lucys disapproving parents, Lees feckless dad Frank and world-weary friends Toby and Anna. In the first episode, Geoffrey reluctantly allows Lee to help Lucy clear up the builders mess in their new kitchen extension. With Geoffrey Whitehead and Deborah Grant

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lucy arranges a special surprise for Lees birthday, which sees their family and friends joining them in a Crystal Maze-style physical adventure game where the objective is to escape from a series of rooms. Domestic comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton

programme.title: Live at the Apollo
programme.sub-title: Dara Ó Briain, Felicity Ward, Mo Gilligan
programme.desc: Mock the Week chairman Dara O Briain comperes the comedy show at Londons Hammersmith Apollo. He warms up the audience before introducing routines by stand-up stars Felicity Ward and Mo Gilligan

programme.title: Live at the Apollo
programme.desc: Emmanuel Sonubi hosts the comedy show filmed at Londons Hammersmith Apollo, introducing stand-up routines by fellow comedians Troy Hawke and Olga Koch

programme.title: Live at the Apollo
programme.desc: Stephen Bailey introduces comedians Lara Ricote and Glenn Moore to the Hammersmith Apollo stage where they perform their stand-up acts in front of a live audience

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Cannonball
programme.desc: Andrew Flintoff hosts the action-packed game show, in which 24 contestants are tasked with traversing a series of water-based challenges and custom-made inflatable obstacles, each designed to test their speed, accuracy, height and distance. The most successful contestants then claim a chance to launch themselves cannonball-style at a moving target on the surface of a deep-water tank, all in the hope of nabbing the shows priceless Cannonball Cup. Frankie Bridge, Radzi Chinyanganya, Ryan Hand and Maya Jama all join Andrew at the poolside to commentate on the action

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: Heavy D, Nat, John, Linda and the rest of the bidders are in Southampton trying to outbid each other. Sean Kelly hosts

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: US host Sean Kelly oversees bidders in Lewes battling to win potential treasures found in storage containers, lock-ups and garages

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The boys are joined by quintessential It girl Tara Palmer-Tomkinson, as Jeremy Clarkson tests Renaults futuristic car the Vel Satis and Richard Hammond drives the BMW Z4 roadster

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson pits the Audi RS6 against its rival, the Mercedes E55 AMG, the engineers from Lotus are faced with the challenge of turning an old Lada into a top-notch machine and the Maserati 4200 GT is put through its paces. Plus, a bunch of white van drivers battle it out on the test track, and Michael Gambon is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Caribbean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The adventurer travels around the islands and mainland coast of the Caribbean Sea, beginning on Hispaniola. He joins the Dominican Republic polices anti-narcotics division, before crossing the border to Haiti to see the notorious tented slums of Cite Soleil, while also discovering a vibrant, colourful and thriving side to the country. He ends this leg of his journey in Puerto Rico, an archipelago that is a territory of the United States, and examines the legacy of bombing and weapons testing on the island of Vieques

programme.title: Caribbean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon meets the owner of a traditional wooden house in Barbados who has turned down millions of dollars from luxury property developers, then encounters marijuana growers on the volcanic island of St Vincent hoping that the drug will soon be decriminalised. On the South American mainland, Simon examines the mismanagement of Venezuelas natural resources, before crossing into Colombia, where he spends time with the Kogi - an indigenous people who have maintained their traditional forest lifestyle

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Bob Mortimer and Paul Whitehouse embark on more angling trips round the UK, beginning by heading to North Uist in the Outer Hebrides. Completely unlike anywhere they have fished before, this small, remote and beautiful island has an intricate network of tidal pools and sea lochs, making it near enough equal parts land and water and therefore the perfect place to fish for sea trout

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Bob and Paul accept an invitation to fish in the estate lake of Burghley House, a 16th-century country house near Stamford in Lincolnshire. Built in the 16th century by William Cecil, Elizabeth Is lord high chancellor, Burghley House is home to some of the most majestic landscapes Paul and Bob have ever found themselves in

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Everyday Gourmets
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers demonstrate how to make gourmet food without breaking the bank. programme.desc: The presenter examines the social significance of cars in the 20th century. programme.title: Queens of Mystery
programme.sub-title: The Modern Art of Murder: First Chapter
programme.desc: A body is discovered at the opening of a new art gallery, and Matties interviews of the suspects dont paint a pretty picture

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Harker finds his principles challenged when he investigates a group of extreme animal liberation activists

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Beech reopens old wounds by trying to pin corruption charges on one of Dalys friends, and calls in a favour from Rickman

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Carver claims to be clean and sober, but his colleagues have their doubts

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Glaze is keen to find the link between a homeless girl, a red baseball cap and a burning man

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Skase sets his sights on arresting a local villain - but his determination may have blinded him to other dangers

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Rumours spread around Poplar that a sailor with smallpox is hiding somewhere in town. Nurse Crane and Dr Turner try to track him down before he causes an outbreak. Lucille treats an expectant mother on her own, but soon feels out of her depth when she displays signs of a serious medical condition. Trixie goes to stay with her godmother, Violet and Fred organise a picnic for the parish, and Tom and Barbara return home

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Barbara helps a pregnant mother-of-two whose husband has recently died, and is on hand to give her support when a further tragedy drives her and her children from their home. Lucille teaches a health and relationships class at the youth club, only to encounter a furious mother who objects to her daughter attending. Sister Monica Joan goes into hospital for cataract surgery

programme.title: Catherine Cooksons A Dinner of Herbs
programme.desc: Conclusion of the two-part drama based on the novel by Catherine Cookson, starring Billie Whitelaw as a herbalist who takes an 11-year-old orphan under her wing. With Tim Healy, Jonathan Kerrigan and Michael Jayston

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: To Peggys delight, teenage heartthrobs the Queenmakers are playing Great Slaughter. However, the bands frontman is found dead from an allergic reaction to a bee sting. This is confirmed to be murder by Sister Boniface when she finds the dead bee and Walliss shirt collar smeared with glue and pollen. Gillespie and Livingstone investigate the rivalries among the band, their conniving manager and Walliss pregnant secret wife, who he was planning to divorce

programme.title: Campion
programme.sub-title: Police at the Funeral - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. The detective is contacted by an old Cambridge friend whose fiancees uncle is missing. Mystery drama series based on Margery Allinghams stories, starring Peter Davison and Brian Glover

programme.title: Harry Wild
programme.sub-title: Hold Your Horses, Weve a Killer to Catch
programme.desc: A fun day at the races for Harry and Fergus ends in tragedy when a racehorse throws a jockey from the saddle

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: A severed finger is brought to the Lyell Centre by DCI Rory Goodchild and immigration enforcement officer Pia Butler, who ask Nikki and Thomas to test for a DNA match with 17 year-old Syrian illegal immigrant Akka Khoury. The teenager was sent the digit by a people-smuggler who claims to have her mother and is demanding money for her safe return. Meanwhile, Akkas 12 year-old cousin Sosa is trying to enter the UK illegally hidden in a van on a cross-channel ferry. Emilia Fox stars

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The squad reopens the investigation into an actresss disappearance when clips of her being assaulted in a 1990 movie are posted on the internet. Director Don Maddox features in the footage, but when questioned, he appears to have problems distinguishing fact from fiction. A potential witness is then found dead, and Brian and Jack are seconded to the unit handling the case, only to find Emily Driscoll (Dennis Watermans daughter Hannah) is heading the operation. Imogen Stubbs and Sandra Dickinson also guest star

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Jane Fergusson is gold panning in the Brokenwood River when shes shot; Detectives learn the Fergusson family has been feuding over gold since the 1860s with the Hollands
